content: While the app was fantastic, WHY ON EARTH are you collecting data and I quote from the new Privacy Policy "when [I] send or respond to emails, messages, chats, or other communications from Headspace" you collect "any personal information [I] include in the body content of [my] communications." to "power machine learning algorithms" (AI) and "personalise adverts". This is such a philosophical contradiction to what this app seems to be about. A greed driven breech of privacy. Uninstalled it.
with each update it is becoming more and more buggy. It crashes way too often and the lag before playing a session is way too much and irritating especially for a app meant for mediation
I've paid such a high amount for this app but it keeps crashing mid session. Completely breaks the rhythm and concentration.
completely paywalled and 50 quid subscription for a year. very overpriced and not worth it.

initially gave this a 5 star review, however the app is so buggy it's at points unusable. Frequently won't connect to Internet despite other apps are working in full signal, and when it does connect, takes ages to load. Would be great if headspace team could look to improve functionality of the app...

already subs but unable to access any session. its been a week. ive been a loyal user since 2023 but this is the first time I have this problem with no change, even after I uninstall and redownload it few times
99.999% of all content is locked behind a paywall.
Incredible app. I get free headspace as a teen and it has really helped me look at the world more positively. 10/10.

Agree with recent negative reviews below - for an App requiring a paid subscription it peforms really badly. Very slow and buggy and most frustratingly after latest update offline downloads don’t work anymore on Android. I mainly use downloaded content to help me with sleep but now it won’t play without internet. Completely counter-productive! Tried all fixes — reinstall, cache clear, re-download — still broken. Not acceptable for a paid app, especially for sleep use.
practically unusable.

I have been stuck on an endless loop trying to log in to my old account. It logs me in on the webpage, tells me to open the app and then logs me into the app with the wrong credentials, with no option to enter the correct email address. I now have to idea how to log in to cancel the free trial. Con artists.
wonderful, magical healing and mindset regulator. love ❤️ 😍 💖

I had been a longtime user of this app and absolutely loved it. I had also recommended it to plenty of people back then but have lately been discontent over the ui. It has way too much content and is super cluttered. For me, Headspace's most basic offerings were and are its most powerful ones. I loved the easy navigation, succinct courses and guidance. I would sincerely urge the developers to make a simpler ui. Most headspace users won't be swayed by new content added every month.
Sometimes, when I was using the app during a meditation, it just stopped.
all features behind paywall
you do have to pay for everything but the app is good
Downloaded the app and I can get past the introductory screen and 3 breath exercise, tried multiple times to restart the app but it didn't work.

highly disappointed. I was recommended this app by a specialist, only to find that to access anything, I have to either pay a yearly subscription or monthly of $19.95. Once I discovered this, I uninstalled the app. No way can I afford another expense, especially when I downloaded the app to help me relax.

Beware, they advertise a 14 days free trial, but I was charged the annual subscription immediately. I had to use Google policies to get a partial refund. Besides that, the app is extremely frustrating, very slow and constantly crashing, even during meditation ! (on a Samsung Galaxy S22)

Avoid this app. But if you want to get it anyway, be EXTREMELY careful as Headspace wont send subscription reminders, and if you are charged they will fight tooth and nail to keep the money no matter what. I got hit hard with a yearly subscription, that they refused to refund. Extremely scummy move considering for whom the app is catered to. Also the AI enshittification is making the app drop in quality significantly. STAY AWAY if you can, there are better alternatives out there.

This app is not easy to navigate. If you want to try the free app, it forces you to click free at the same time as subscribe. The 2 are not separate. Then you cancel anytime, another hassle. Try for free is not the way it sounds. Horrible horrible experience.
why is everything locked 😟

this app used to be great. the last year it's gone downhill. customer service isn't great anymore either. I had 3 issues, one was addressed, 2 weren't despite me following up. one was that i was advised of a renewal premium and then was charged a higher premium. so disappointing now from what it used to be
daily necessity for a calm experience

Scheduling appointments are easy, but every other provider I've seen virtually sends a text message with a link to the session 10 minutes prior. Headspace only sends a push notification that's easy to miss, which I did. It also seems there's no phone number to call and quickly resolve issues, so this has just been a bigger headache when all I wanted was support.

Absolutely pathetic. I've purchased a 1 year subscription for an app that is completely unusable. The app is ubearably slow, often freezes mid session and my downloads randomly dissapear. And that's if you can even log in! If your purchase is older than 65 days you can't get a refund, so I've paid almost 60 euros for a years worth of acces to a complete garbage app, great work headspace team.
You been vibe coding this or something? Over the last few months the app has become slow and unresponsive... worked brilliantly when I first signed up.

Meditations themselves are varied and super nice! Really reccomended it to whoever is new to mindfulness and would like an introduction to use and incorporate it into daily life. App interface and stability is getting better with latest updates. Would be nive if there was a feature to reset your progress within a mediation pack, even if you haven't fully completed it yet. Sometimes a meditation is cut off mid session due to connection issues by the app and i have to restart it.
I don't want to pay if I need a lot of help and I don't have money I am only 12 and I have a lot of exciting and ADHD an my mom said she is not paying for it 8
Good app, but please please make a setting to turn off the haptic feedback when I press on buttons. I really don't like the sensation when I'm trying to relax.
think positive
Sick people feeding off sick people, makes me sick.

Too expensive. And getting them to verify official documents to get the student discount? Impossible! SheerID rejects pretty much anything uploaded from a cell phone claiming its not official. You can't use your student email to verify, you have to upload a document. Why use a verification site that won't verify me by my school provided email and rejects every document uploaded? Thanks HeadSpace... guess I won't relax. School isn't stressful or anything..🙄
Quite literally everything has to be paid for. Nothing is free and I think that should be mentioned in some way

The content deserves 5 stars, and it's become an important part of my toolkit for managing either anxiety or nights where I can't sleep. However, the app has become very unstable lately - eg: if I play any track, I then have to clear out the cache before I can play anything else, otherwise I get 2 mins of audio before it crashes and infinitum. It also crashes when I jump to YouTube or a music app, or when I try to download anything for offline listening. Severely downgrading quality of the app
Content is great The app is getting worse with every update, it's pretty bad... Soon I'll have to find an alternative 😢

1 extra star as it could be and used to be pretty good but it has long since stopped syncing with Google Fit no matter what I try and now crashes mid session during most attempts to use it. Basically the app has been bricked by recent updates. edit 3/26: Another update and once again everything stops working. Just roll it back to the version from 12 months ago and then leave it alone!

The app is back to being good now that they've fixed the lag and crashing from the design update (at least for me). However, I still feel the app looks very busy now and reminds me of social media which I'm trying to avoid the stimulation of when getting on Headspace. The simpler layout was better, faster, and easier to navigate.

Changed phones and can't log in - asked for help, support has been working on it since January. The app creates new profiles based on email addresses if you use the wrong one and although they can bill you through Google play, they can't figure out how to get you logged into your account. I've had this account for +5 years.

Having concluded email Headspace support this past week, it seems there's no way to see or opt out of a coach using an AI chatbot when replying to me as a Headspace Care member. So I believe I will have to not use this for more than its existing content library because - beyond what I said and got back in above threads - I would have to disclose more particulars about what my friend circles are like than we're comfortable possibly having sent to such AI tool companies I can't verify at all.
used to be gold, now bought by Blackstone. bloated, buggy as hell, waste of money. another victim of rampant capitalism...
Worked perfectly fine while I had a free trial to it's premium features, but lost access to EVERYTHING since cancelling it. I can't use a single feature now that I've cancelled my trial.
crashes during sleepcasts. 1 star. it's a quite recent issue, late 2025 i guess. im on android s22. please fix it, and ill change rating to 5 star which it usually deserves.
The app has lots and lots of technical problems
Not as useful as I thought... so far.
Nothing works the way HR describes. There is no EAP, no new parent coaching. I removed it.

Your latest update yet again nuked my download section, it's all empty while the apps is taking up 4gb data. So those downloads are still there just not being listed. It frustrates me a lot that this happens regularly with the updates. Also why would you only let a user set very random set timers, 5 min or 500 min, How about let the user decide when the music should stop? it's freaking loop music anyways. + You can't make a playlist. Such basic futures but you didn't think about any of them.

Predatory app. Slow, messy UI and superficial content. Super hard to keep track of anything in the app. Gave up on it, never received an email before my subscription was extended. Contacted them immediately, explained that I am ill and unable to work at the moment, but they still refuse to cancel the extension. Wastes your time, stresses you out and leeches your money, so about the opposite of what anyone looking for a meditation app needs.

It's a damn good app with a huge library of sounds, meditations, useful mental health support routines, and plenty to be listening to when you need help getting to sleep. Unfortunately the app is HORRIBLY unstable, and it's not a big help when you wake up in the middle of the night, try to use the app for help getting back to sleep, and having to mess around with forced stops, resets, and cache clearances. A five-star app with one-star reliability.

Both me and my partner have had problems with this app. It sometimes just stop playing the audio randomly, which has the opposite effect of what the app is aiming to do! Then randomly it might start again many minutes later. very poor!

I have been a subscriber for years and have enjoyed this app and it's content. In 2026 I have experienced multiple app glitches that have ruined my user experience. Meditations stop several minutes in, courses do not automatically proceed to the next session, or I get logged out of the app mid meditation. All have been escalated to support with no solution besides "we are working on it keep your app updated to the latest version" for several months. I will not be purchasing another subscription.

2nd update: another week later. I have been reduced to using the YouTube meditations because I can't use the app. I loved the app and content for 6 years, but how much more can I take?! Update update March 2026: A week later, and I still can't use the app I paid a yearly subscription for. It won't let me open anything. It keeps saying "error you already have a subscription". I logged in and out and uninstalled the app. please help!
EXEELENT with star
cost of $17+ is ridiculous
poor app, poor customer supporr, high costs, alot of issues, renewal wiithout informing, no refund policy

Everything is completely pay-walled now, really disappointing. They used to have content that was accessible without a membership but it doesn't seem like there is anything that doesn't require the membership.

March 2026-app crashes constantly Many years ago I had a subscription to headspace and I found the app at that time really intuitive: easy to find courses and follow a pathway. Now, I feel like this app is packed with so much stuff (great!) but the stuff is everywhere, not organized in an intuitive way like before. I find it hard to find where I left off with a pathway, the app is always recommending content, but not where I left off with something. IMHO content=great. Interface=not great
love the features. hate that it constantly freezes and crashes

The meditations are great, but it so insanely hard to find anything in the app. I started a guided program and the next day at first it showed on the today page but after that it disappeared and I can't find it. UX could be improved for searching and finding stuff, going back to programs you've started or previously done without having to favorite them.

Love the content but hate the rank amateur UI and basic functionality. They spend a lot of money on new content but either don't have a budget for functionality or have had someone incompetent in charge of that for years. Tracks will pause or crash partway through but there's no way to know while meditating until several minutes later when there haven't been any vocal instructions. More issues than the character limit here. Complaints to the scripted "empathic" customer support change nothing.
replyContent: Sorry for any trouble with the app! Please send our team a message at help@headspace.com so we can look into this for you.

userName: MARK Daniel Ayala Ross Christionson N
content: HEAD SPACE IS AWSOME.

Auparavant super bonne expérience avec l'application mais depuis mon renouvellement l'application bug et est très lente sur mon appareil. Très frustrant surtout considérant le prix de mon abonnement. Samsung S25 Ultra

Awful app. I did not mean to purchase a subscription and now I'm being charged for a year with no refund options. I used this app for 3 days and hated the service and will never use it again. Yet I am being required to continue paying for it. Awful customer service. Stay far away - anyone with anxiety doesn't need extra stress.

I used to love this so for the sleep casts. A repeat option or continuous option would be nice. However, since last the app functionality sucks. It either won't open at all or if it opens the features stop working.
App crashes whenever I try to scroll through all singles
Terrible company. Refused to refund any money, did not benefit from the service.

Recently downloaded the app this week based on the Cigna recommendation. I'm getting the annoying emails asking me to do a daily check in. I go to do this today and the app keeps crashing. I wasn't looking for additional reasons to meditate and find my zen.

The app is not worth the subscription. It barely functions and sessions are constantly interrupted by pauses and skips. Some of the content is helpful but most sessions can be found for free online. The app settings also default to sharing and selling your personal data including information for targetted ads which is disappointing.
currently meditations keep auto pausing and say you're offline despite having perfect connection. it's constant, borderline unusable. looking online I am not the only one. fix asap
Doesn't link to Google Fit and has an error on ever attempt to link it. also doesn't link with Ours? even though Oura will launch the app

I've loved this app for years but unfortunately the sleepcasts have started crashing a few minutes in for the past few months. I've updated the app, made sure to have wifi on, I even bought a new phone thinking it was me but it still happens. Sadly if this doesnt get fixed soon ill have to cancel my subscription and delete the app which I REALLY don't want to do. Please fix this app!

I used to love this app. The meditations are great and really help me to get to sleep. I have been using this app for about 2 years with no issues until just before Christmas when it suddenly started switching off mid meditation. As soon as I unlock the app it starts playing again but this is not relaxing. Sometimes it stops playing during my sleep meditation and I cba to get up and put it back on, but then it turns back on randomly in the middle of the night and jumps me awake. Not a happy user
App crashing frequently. Please fix the issue as soon as possible. Thank you

I downloaded this app because of issues with anxiety. Although not a 'fix all', the yoga exercises, mood music, bedtime stories, and all the other things offered really helped to neutralise and ground when my anxiety was getting bad to the point of freezing. I paid for it since it was about the price of a coffee out per month, and it has definitely been worth it

When it works it's fine. I'm having an issue woth the app where it shuts down anything I'm listening to due to a playback error. Everything is updated but it still stops playing. I'd rather get a refund of the membership than deal with this over and over again.
Great lessons, many options!

Ever since the app was updated to this new prettier version reliability has been in the toilet. Reliability is massively important with an app like this. Meditation sessions contain long silent periods. It's impossible to know with one's eyes closed during a session if a gap in audio is temporary and part of the exercise or the result of yet another crash. The old app worked every single time. This one is whack and will likely lead to me not renewing my subscription.
it crash all the time, not reliable

The application does not work in Android devices. I have barely used it and raised my concern three times to customer service with a refund request of the annual fee. The response was the same script copied and pasted the three times, no empathy, no understanding the situation. Save time and money and do not even try this app.
the app won't let me log in

Am now uninstalling. Been a user of this app for years however the past 6-8 months the app has become very unstable stopping playing content, saying there's a problem, of just hanging. Had circumnavigated by using both the app and the Web site but now the Web site if pushing you to the app for new content. a real shame but if your wanting to look after your mental wellbeing the app is no longer the soothing place it was, but a deeply frustrating, troublesome and annoying place to seek calm.
worked fine on the first day, now every time I click on daily assessment it crashes

the screen on which i signed up on said "the first 14 days are free". I canceled 5 days later since the tracks keep stopping a few minutes in ("oh dear, something is wrong"). But somehow my membership is still active until next year (though canceled) and I was charged full price. I provided a screenshot to customer service but they said i didn't get the trial. No explanation, but at least they "sincerely apologize for the disappointment ". extremely false advertising!

I’ve used Headspace for a long time, but the app has become extremely unreliable. During meditations it frequently stops and shows “Oops, something went wrong,” which completely breaks your focus. This has been happening for months. When I try to get help, I’m pushed to AI that only tells me to uninstall and reinstall the app. That’s not a real solution, especially mid-meditation. Very frustrating, and it’s nearly impossible to reach a real person for support.
Love listening before bed. Helps me to unwind.
They first encourage to install and then take all the details and then tell you you gotta pay Annual fee to use the app. Even before you use there trial they take Card details. Not fair practice.
The meditation session was very relaxing! I needed that break.
Freezes up daily, so I have to clear the cache more or less every time I open it

I've been using the app for years and it has been a great companion to help me focus and ground my mind. Andy has undergone some serious training and is more than qualified to be teaching about meditation and presence and his voice is very soothing which helps a lot. However, for the past months or so, the app stops mid meditation saying there was a problem. My sessions are cut short on an unpredictable basis which basically ruins the experience. I would kindly ask the developers to fix this...

I love headspace have had the subscription for years. now the app seems buggy I like the ai ebb feature but I feel I am spending more time getting the app tho work. same with sleep scapes they don't seem to make it through the night

I'm tired of how buggy the app is. I was so close to canceling before my annual renewal, but a long back and forth with help resolved issues. But now there are new bugs just a few weeks later. it makes anything longer than a few minutes unplayable. This is exhausting.

Someone in my household signed me up for the free trial without my knowledge. I only became aware of it once the trial expired and I was charged for a full year of the service. I contacted them on the same day that the charge was made to let them know what had happened and that I did not want their services and asked if it would be possible to get a full or partial refund. They refused. Overall, this app has had a negative effect on my mental health.
the app kept closing listening to focus music. but they had a fix online to sort out as it was an android issue that was easily fixed

I am looking for a good app for sleep aid, I have terrible sleep. The entire sleep aid part of this app is locked behind a pay wall, I do not have the money to pay for sound. I will be sticking to my CD player, it works better.

Every video Ive listened to sounded like they were explain things to a child- with basic explanations and in the way they spoke- so they werent very good. There were some videos that sounded helpful to listen to, but they must not be available anymore? It said I had to download the app to get access to them, but then they werent in the app either. I feel like everything this app provides is basic info that can be found on the internet for free. Its just not for me.
recently certain videos only not opening getting error and asked to click ok button

It's not a very helpful app. But the worst part of my experience with it has been that they eventually charged me for a whole year even though I only subscribed for a trial which I cancelled before it expired (as I found the app unhelpful). They refuse to offer even a partial refund. Very disappointing service.
I have a new Samsung Galaxy phone. It frequently stops during a meditation and I get an error message

I enjoy the meditations and exercises, but the app seems to have a hard time consistently loading. I've had to restart my phone three or four times so far in order to get the app to load properly. not the most calming experience.

Update: It's good, but the fact that there's no voice to text is hard. I can't keep typing it in on the phone, but Ebb is good. It's the main reason I like Headspace. Just please put a button for voice to text on Ebb. Maybe an option to personalize the home tab.

This app is a lifesaver for managing anxiety and sleep, I've been using it for year. But lately 10min into a sleep cast it crashes and then I wake up to start it again. Kinda defeats the purpose. I tried to change the setting with battery and background data but nothing seems to help.

Deleted it. I like apps that have at least 1% of free stuff. But everything is behind the paywall. I'm not sure why this app is promoted as something free. This is the first time I came across an app that has everything locked. It's unbelievable that apps like this are subscription based for everything considering it's for mental health. Honestly, apps like Finch are better and cute. I don't mind the paywall, but to lock everything completely even for emergency breath exercises are insane.

I've been using the app during lockdown in 2020-21 and it worked okay. However when I started to use it in 2025 I encountered a lot of problems that kills all effects of practice. The video player is awful - it doesn't rotate by itself and let the screen to go to sleep mode... so I have to track every 10 min to wake it up during my yoga practice. Music and meditation can randomly crash the app. In the course "Fear of the Future" lessons 8 and 9 are actually the lesson 4. I have Xiaomi 14t
Sleepcasts are great, but the app just gets worse over time. UI freezes a lot, almost unusable now. they need to spend more on QA.

This app is pure junk. Horrible audio quality, crashes all the time when I try to exit a mediation and then won't load. Then, it loads slow. And how can this app not have background play for videos? + sooo many UX issues with the app... You can't have an app so bad at this level. Do something!
This AP is very effective and does help me very much. Try it today. Priced low too!

Good content but the app tech let's you down. I love the sound scapes but all of them stop after about 15 minutes and show this error 'Oh dear, something's wrong'. I have been using the app occassionally for the past few months and I keep getting this error every single time.
Gor the last few months, the app has been glitchy and often crashes.

Headspace is awesome! so much content being offered to help you on your life's journey. I am grateful for this because I have suffered with chronic pain since I was a child. The information contained is amazing and helpful for you wherever you are at in this moment. I recommend Headspace and encourage everyone to give it a try!
mine

I canceled in October, after I found out services offered through employer health plans are not available to individuals. The app without an employer healthplan is in my personal opionion insufficient rendering it useless to me.

The latest update stops Google fit syncing which now also affects vitality points. seems to also be a bug which causes infinitely refreshing. still an issue and now can connect to Google fit as it's a blocked app

Looks and feels like a game, not a mental health app. I was gonna just buy the annual subscription straight up. So pleased I checked out how the app has changed first. Definitely wasn't like this when it started. Pile of rubbish

it's unfortunate that I have to leave this review after being a subscriber for over 5 years. The app has always been slow and buggy but I've been able to work around that until now. The app has been left in an unusable state for almost 2 months now. Every single session crashes after just a couple of minutes. I've contacted the support team and they say they are aware of the issue but 2 months is too long to not even have basic functionality, especially considering how much they charge.

I have a had an amazing experience with the Ebb feature for reflection, which has helped me make a lot of progress on my personal goals and mental state. I did notice that now there seems to be a 30 minute limit to Ebb chat sessions? I can see why this was instituted, but it feels artificial and I really think that the way it was previously without the time limit was more beneficial as sometimes 30minutes is not enough time to be able to reflect on some things. Can this time limit be removed?

The app has been incredibly buggy lately and troubleshooting does not yield results. Reaching out to the company doesn't seem to help either. For how much I pay, it really is a poor experience in the app, which is disappointing because it used to be great. Considering cancelling at this point because of all the bugs.
crashes every time I use it. waste of money.

have used this for years but the past few months has been genuinely awful and unusable. sleepcasts routinely cutting out after 4 - 10 minutes, and today my 15 minute meditation stopped working leaving me to have to exit my meditation state myself and check, only to be met with an error message. also the way the app vibrates when you click on the sleep section at night is super unnecessary and unexpected.
I used to like the app a lot. But recently many guided meditations fail in the middle with an error. It takes me many minutos to know it has stopped.
The app doesn't let me log in. It does not even show any errors. It just says that "it looks like your account has been associated with a social account".

I have had an amazing time with the app, but it seemingly out of nowhere lost the ability to have not text but voice chat. Being unavailable is sad because I was enjoying the feature while talking with Ebb, and our talks feel less real without it. P.S. Thank you for reading it. We are delighted to hear you have been enjoying the app.

I have been using this app for about a year now and I can honestly say that the meditation courses and the daily medication and the wake ups all have helped my mental health a lot. Highly recommend 6 years later and still highly recommend. has updated a lot but honestly for the better, great app and community.
it's relaxing and good
fun may to meet strangers*

Constantly crashing and freezing, despite restarts, reinstalls, and changing settings. Incredibly frustrating to use what used to be a great app. The interface is now very cluttered, and it's harder than ever to find what you're looking for. I'm giving in and switching to an alternative.
I thought I could use it the free version but there's only a "freemium" version. Very disappointed.

There are better meditation apps out there in 2026. This app has not kept up with the times and does not allow for basic functionality that I would expect from any meditation app these days. I would expect a paid app to allow me to set the exact length of a meditation that I am looking for as opposed to pre-set lengths. Other meditation apps let you choose from different voices. And the latest apps even have AI integrations to make a custom meditation. 10/10 do not recommend for any price
Buggy and seems like it's full of mostly AI slop.

Shady lame tricky little deviants they tell that you get a free guest pass for 30 days if you share it with a friend and when you do you still don't get anymore access than you had! It still wants you to sign up for the free trial and when the trial is over it will charge you full price. It says: When you send a guest pass to a new member they get access to all of headspace for a month, then membership automatically renews to a paid membership. It's a scam all the way

found out I could get a subscription through my job and did one meditation which was very helpful! recently they emailed me about the new Ebb, an AI feature I can't seem to shut off. I will be looking for alternatives to this app now bc gross , AI :/
crazy long on boarding flow, only to find simple features paywalled. straight garbage.
paid app ridiculous price

Where has the run streak gone? Just a silly greyed out bit of nonsense in its place. App now working again after a fortnight of ridiculous glitches. I had to allow it access to my first born to get it to quit stopping in the middle of sessions. Stupidly annoying and an afront to my battery life and privacy. Sort it out please developers!

I didn't expect a 70$ a year app to have a 15 seconds loading screen every time you click on something until the recent update. And you have to opt out of them selling your personal data. The app is very difficult to navigate. there are hundreds of meditations which are the same thing with a few different words at the beginning. More doesn't always mean better.

The different UI updates were not great but now the app is a mess and has no timeline of the daily meditations. I miss the early days with the animations and simply meditation vs focus and move. Now the Basics intro course hard to find at all and no guidance on progression.

I have been using this app for more 3 months on a regular basis and paid for the yearly subscription. Whenever I start my meditation it works fine but in between it stops and I usually notice it later. Everytime I have to clear the app from the cache and restart. It happens everyday. Kinda Disappointed.
amazing app, but losing the streak of long meditation because internet connection is unstable by the end of it, it's unnerving.

just no. you need to pay a monthly subscription to do anything. and I don't mean "all the good features" like most apps do, I mean the first thing you click on tells you to start a free trial and the app is not usable without it

Andy Puddicombe was the voice of Headspace but he has stepped back and others have stepped up. I discovered Andy on Netflix and it helped me tune in to meditation. I got frustrated earlier when I couldn't find any meditations voiced by him. With patience I found them, they are still there. Thanks Headspace for all that you are doing. Thank you Andy for your meditation guidance, I hope you are getting what you are looking for ongoing

I use Google fit to sync meditation data from Headspace however Google has moved away from Google fit and moved to health connect due to which unable to connect Google fit anymore. "Google-side OAuth restriction affecting Google Fit API on Android 15"

I remember I found this app when it was just starting out. Now, years later, I'm kind of very disappointed. I understand that everyone needs and wants to make money, but the cost simply isn't feasible for me (and probably others who wanted to try the app). It’s frustrating in the sense that there are implied free options when in actually there are none. This is an amazing app, but woefully unattainable for many.

Although a good concept in theory, quite annoying in practice, even with a premium subscription: 1. No offline access whatsoever, the app does not load with data turned off. 2. Playing of podcasts, longer contents pauses regularly if my screen is not awake. 3. Unprofessional, unpleasant voice narration compared to industry standards. They might be experts in meditation but their voices are dissatifying. Medito and Fabolous are on another level. 4. The extensive library is confusing. Guide needed
used to love this app, but lately, the sleep casts and meditations will shut off after a few minutes with no reason. Defeats the purpose!!
The meditation just stops playing the audio. Troubleshooting is terrible and tries to give me the responsibility of the problem. Terrible for the price it asks

The sleep meditations are calming but crash way too often. ill be about to fall asleep and all of a sudden the ambience cuts off while the voice keeps playing. very jarring and eerie for someone trying to sleep. It honestly wouldn't be a bad idea to include the ability to download tracks for offline use. Will adjust rating if it ever gets fixed.
It helped me a lot in calming down and just slowing down things. I can only recommend if you have these problems too.

In the past I found this app really helped with my inability to fall asleep. I recently subscribed and rather than helping me fall asleep, the app is adding to my frustration because it frequently crashes. Last night I tried 4 times to listen to a sleep cast and each time the app crashed about 5 to 10 minutes in. Disappointing because when it works, the app is really helpful.

It's not serious for a paid app to have as many bugs as Headspace. To name some of them: - App stops playing audio in the middle of a meditation. This happens every two or three days. - Language is not saved properly. I have to set the language every time I open the app. - Saved (offline) audios are lost, so basically you can't save audios Please, make sure you test the app well before releasing it on several phone models. Mine is a Xiaomi 15T Pro. I will cancel my subscription.

For an app that's supposed to help with maintaining mental health and calm, it's currently doing the opposite for me. There's a frustrating unpredictability to if the app is just going to stop, everything takes ages to load, it will periodically tell me I'm offline when I'm not. And yet other times it works fine. It's normally the former though. If this continues I won't be renewing my subscription (got it cheap for first yr, not currently worth full price at all)
love the content but the app crashes more often then it doesn't. Crashes half way through a meditation or searching for courses. Would love to rate it better, please fix

I do really like the sleepcasts, but they are poorly organized. Please provide a filter/sort option - I would like to be able to find all the sleepcasts with rain for instance, or ocean sounds, or running water, or wildlife. Also, getting to sleep is good, but I also want a smart alarm and a way to wake up gently, similar to my meditations. I want it to start out soft with slowly increasing volume to gently wake me from sleep - unlike a startling alarm clock.

this app seems way too complicated and it's too hard to figure out how to get started. why do i need to choose between 6 instructors just to try the beginning meditation course, which itself is hard to find because its burried below 12 other courses on a separate tab? i uninstalled at this point. the app is asking me to make decisions that seem important when i have no information to base those decisions on. too stressful.
Really good ap with range of options for meditation. only downside is the email spamming to sign up for in person counseling.

5 stars for the meditations. And the app is stable again after months of problems. I still occasionally need to force close, but overall, I'm pleased with the functionality. Not sure that the AI stuff is necessary, and the user experience could be improved, but maybe that's just me. thanks for fixing the app.

AI is not a substitute for therapy. Headspace turned from something that genuinely helped me sleep better into something that constantly pushed its AI features. I didn't like how they used my data. I canceled my subscription after 9 years of almost daily use.
I had to cancel my subscription. often when I try to meditate the app crashes after some seconds making my anxiety even worse.
excellent app, amazing content. allows you to settle in and choose your pace. the support from the team is fantastic quick and efficient resolutions
Will not sync with Google fit. longstanding issue not being addressed although acknowledged by support desk. old version did work fine, so why not revert??

This app is great for the meditation guidance. I like that you can choose your teacher, and how long or short your practice will be. But, the push to try therapy through Headspace gets annoying, especially when you already HAVE a therapist (not to mention that therapists who contract with apps are very often underpaid). I'd love a way to disable those features.
Subscribed the app to earn Manulife Vitality points. unfortunately, It never worked from the beginning. The app can't connect to Google fit even after trying all methods that can be found online.

I found this really useful for managing my anxiety through learning to meditate. but lately the app is consistently crashing before the end of the meditation. Which makes it completely unusable. especially with the advanced courses - I can't tell if the app is meaning to be silent or of it's crashed without monitoring it, and monitoring the app is the opposite of meditation.
latest update completely broke downloaded soundscapes. they don't load then crash the app. simply streaming soundscapes works but they stop playing after 15 minutes.
need to pay dam money for me to sleep soundly
Completely broken app. I informed support a month ago and their solution was to use the website. The app is still completely broken for me.

I have been using Headspace for years, and I think the content within the app is really well done. Unfortunately, the app has been very laggy and slow, taking multiple minutes to load pages at times. Also, listening to tracks while having my screen turned off (ie for sleep tracks or focus music), the app almost always crashes and kicks me back to the main screen with no easy way to resume what I was listening to. Really disappointing app performance, hope the team is able to fix this soon.
Amazing app with meditations for all sorts. Would be good if you could turn off the vibration feedback as can be a bit jarring after winding down to go to sleep
Sleepcasts stop after a few minutes, massively frustrating when you're already feeling on edge
Very slow app, almost unusable
Does not work at all. Can't play anything at all. Keeps crashing, streaming or downloading both don't work. Totally unusable.
It's has become extremely slow and clunky. The content is great as always but it's virtually impossible to get to with the sluggish UI that takes forever to render.
really enjoy the content but the app is horrible. It regularly fails to play content when my phone's lock screen comes on which renders it useless.

Useless! I get a Headspace subscription through Cigna but no matter how many times I try to connect my account, it will not connect. I've reinstalled the app and it still will not connect to my Cigna account. For an app that's for stress reduction, you've made this process very stressful.

WORST APP EVER!!!! This app is trash. Nothing changes. How can this be relaxing, when the app just stops playing in the middle of a meditation, without letting you know? The only way I know that it stops is I hear nothing for a bit and then have to check my screen. This happens so much that it is hard to relax, since sometimes there is a long pause and sometimes the app has stopped. Unless something significantly improves, I will not renew my subscription - there are better apps out there.

Great app BUT constantly buffering/shutting down part way through a track. Support is a bot. Read the other recent reviews - just doesn't work. Definitely won't renew. Update: cancelled membership and they don't even ask why? Marketing 101-they're not going to fix a problem they don't want to hear about.

Everything takes so long to load. I constantly get an error saying I'm not connected to wifi both on wifi and cell network when everything else is working fine on my phone and I can't reschedule an appointment as required. An app supporting mental health should not be causing more anxiety.
Frequently hangs and I have to kill the app and start over. I just started using it so perhaps it's downloading things in the background? either way this isn't a good user experience.
They fixed the bug and it plays all the way through without crashing after a couple of minutes.
app is slow. some nights it takes a minute to load. Just when you get relaxed the app stops and closes. Not much new stuff. Pixel 10 Pro on Google Fi, so it shouldn't be a phone issue
Good when it works, but it keeps crashing 2 minutes into a soothe body and mind meditation. Using a Samsung s10+ phone.

I've been a headspace user on Android for years and it was always such a good app. However, for the past few months it has been simply unusable. Buggy, crashes and is so slow. I will not be renewing my subscription and I'm really unhappy with this
can't use unless you pay witch is really upsetting as some people don't have the money and may need access to said app

sleepcasts crash. total UI fail into complexity. they can't even get the stress management course right, it just loops on the intro video, the course doesn't get added to your main view so you have to go hunt for it again. and there's no way to see subsequent content in the course. I've watched headspace go from useful 5-7ish years ago to rock bottom cash grab today. spend your hard earned money with a company that appreciates it, not this one. fire your UI director, wrong direction.
app has been unusable
thanks you made mesmarter

Soundscapes keep crashing within 15 minutes. Suddenly everything goes quiet whilst falling asleep, actually waking me up again. Very annoying and rebooting my phone or reinstalling the app doesn't help at all. bollocks
removed free version completely.
I have been using Headspace since 2021. It's tremendously helpful for daily meditation guidance, I enjoy the Wake Up segments and I regularly use Sleepcast stories to help me sleep.

I have paid for this app but it is bugs since long time ago. after about 1 min of playing of an audio it stops and can't continue. and the response from help desk is to use the website which is also not helpfuöl because it doesn't contain the same material! I have a limitee timed to use the app for the money i am playing but it can't br used. waste of money!

keeps crashing in the middle of sleepcasts. I have a newborn and I need to be able to get to sleep quickly when it's my husband's shift with her as I only have 2.5 hours. Very unhelpful to have it crash after just a few minutes and send me back to square 1.
This apps used to work, but now it keeps giving error messages every single time.
is there nothing on the app for free? what a scam
your app is worthless. nothing on it will help and your ai is patronizing and annoying

good idea and when they work the guided meditations are helpful but they seem to crash more often than not. especially hard for a meditation app because you don't know if it's a long pause or the app crashed (usually the app has crashed) and you need to get out of your meditation to check, reload and start it all over. basically ruining the whole experience and highly counterproductive.

sync to Google FIT broken for months, lame response and no urgency to fix (so cannot get points credited for Vitality health app - useless) plus increasingly cluttered design UNBELIEVABLE STILL NOT FIXED. MANY MONTHS LATER - SIMPLY DO NOT CARE. THEY ARE SCREWING OVER VITALITY AND THEIR CUSTOMERS. TERRIBLE SERVICE RESPONSES - PLATITUDES -- still broken Feb2026

love this app, worth every cent

Google Fit integration no longer works as Google deprecated the Fit APIs and Headspace still have not migrated to Google Health Connect. This means anyone on the Vitality Health or Life Insurance plan cannot claim points for meditation each day due to the lack of this integration. Seeing as Google Fit API deprecation was signposted as far back as 2024, it's baffling as to why this hasn't been migrated by now.
Still keeps glitching after updating. Gives an error message of "oops, something went wrong." Very aggravating when it's 30 seconds into a sleep cast or calming meditation.
ts is so hard to use

updates only seem to make app worse. Now it constantly tells me I am offline or i get an error message shortly after it starts to play. App is too expensive for such poor quality. cancelled subscription for something more reliable.
solution for app crashing it's being caused by battery optimisation setting on phone. hope this is fixed soon but workaround helping for now
app just hangs for me, tried reinstalling etc but can hardly access anything and have to force close all the time

EDIT: I used to love this app, see my original review below. But now all the content is paid content. Before the basics were free. Good mental health should be accessible to everyone. Old review: Normally I think meditation is pretty stupid, that on top of the highest mountain rubbish. But I really like this app, helps me sleep at night. Nice to find a down to earth guided meditation

Awful. Apparently I had purchased my subscription through the Google Play store, but Google has no history of my subscription and headspace claims ignorance because they say I purchased through a "third party site", so it's not their problem. Now I get charged 14 bucks a month for an app I don't use, don't want, and cannot cancel. Reporting to BBB, attorney general, and a couple class action attorneys I know for deceptive business practices. Don't buy or subscribe.
They need to fix the crashing problem in sleepcasts and guided meditation.

The audio and visual don't line up on many of the 5 deep breath exercises, especially the one with the cat. That one is the worst. It makes it difficult to determine when I'm actually supposed to be breathing. The audio and the video should go together. I used to edit video for a living, syncing isn't that hard.
app keeps crashing after about 2 mins. very frustrating restarting multiple times. not quite conducive to meditation.

At last! You've fixed the slow startup problem and I don't have to keep killing the app or reinstalling. Thank you. Did it really have to take so long to fix it? Other: content is good but a bewildering amount of choice, and the AI makes inappropriate recommendations. It would be good to get rid of so much chat during the meditations. It doesn't take lots of words to bring you back to focus, just a reminder (a chime, even).

I've been using the app for 7 years, but it seems to be getting worse. Half the time the app does not load and has to be reopened. Worse, the meditations now frequently stop in the middle ("something has happened, tried again"). Unfortunately I can't recommend this app anymore. That's too bad, I really liked their meditations and sleeping sounds.
have to pay to relax

I′ve used this app for years. It used to be great. I feel bad giving 1 star when it′s been so helpful for me in the past. Lately, it′s been terrible. The newest UI is horrible. The bad UI and constant bugs for months is really pushing me to do that. Edit: After many months, it′s not so slow now, but the UI still sucks.

Since a couple of weeks the app keeps disconnecting during meditations. been using it for years. alternate between sleep casts (which are enormous so can't download) they keep crashing a few seconds in. V stressful when trying to get to sleep

I've been a paying member for years. I canceled my auto renew over the summer after the app got busy, glitchy, and unresponsive, but got billed this morning anyway. Customer service won't help me and there is no way to make a formal complaint. My experience notably echoes that of countless others. Predatory behaviour from a company that talks a big game about compassion and wellbeing. Very disappointing.

the app crashes or freezes constantly. It's really hard to meditate when a paid app operates as poorly as this. This has been constantly happening over the past few months. I am going to have to search for an alternative because I can't have this keep happening.
I can't even get it to open. so it sux!
The audio tracks constantly stop in the middle of meditations, without letting you know. So you're left 10+ min with your eyes closed before realising it isn't working

this app is disgusting. advertising for people with high stress levels and anxiety, yet includes no free optipns AT ALL within the app. its understandable to have the longer meditations as pay-per-view or subscriptions, but to have to pay for even the 1 minute meditation is just money laundering atp. the AD i saw on youtube gave me a better experience compared to the app overall. would not reccomend, honestly just watch a video on youtube. do better.

I truly hate the new UI layout. The old app didn't make you search for a new Meditation session to use each day it just provided you with a list when you opened the app. I am spending too much time searching.
One or two things unlocked and then everything else is paid. What a waste.

The content is great, however the apps ability to buffer content is none existent so it has ended up being anxiety provoking, with mediation just stopping at random points thinking it is offline when it is not. Sadly support are not really interested.

Just adding my voice and frustration with the app suddenly stopping mid session. Ive uninstalled and reinstalled the app many times hoping it would correct the issue. I've depended on this app to help me fall asleep, but with these issues, getting decent sleep is getting more difficult.

Do not get this for pain management, I got this app for pain management, they say to you to relax that area and bring your mind to that pain, so once I let go everything had locked up in that area, causing me to immediately stop meditating.

They use dark patterns in their email preference settings to sell user data by using unclear language to make you click yes. Never trust companies that rely on dark patterns. Aside from that the app crashes literally non stop

This app is currently unusable, as much as the content is excellent. Reinstalling, battery optimisation settings, nothing works. options of music and meditation are great but I paid an anual fee to be able to listen to them for as long as I want to yet none of them play for more then 2 minutes. playback keeps stopping giving an error message. this is AFTER the most recent update. this is NOT a cheap app, this bug needs to be fixed. it has been like this for months.

This app used to be great prior to like 6 months ago. Now, it stops 1 min after starting a soundscape even when the app is set to allow background activity, SUPER SLOW to open and load anything, buffers constantly even with good internet connection, and will crash in the middle of trying to navigate the app. I've been a customer since 2019 and I'm actually thinking of canceling my subscription and moving to a different app because it irritating me so much.

I have been using this app for close to 10 years exclusively for meditation. While the content is great with many types of meditations with great guides, the stability of the app has taken a nose dive in the last 4ish months. it will often interrupt the meditation without any notifications. i sent a note to support and got the following back which I cannot verify yet but wanted to share. a possibility is the app /battery optimization might be killing off the meditation, so disable it for HS.

I really wanted to love this app..and I believe I would have done but unfortunately it kept crashing on my phone. Motorola E15. so slow and the support is beyond awful
Was great but has been glitching and freezing lately. Even after following the steps recommended about battery saver settings. Won't connect to Google fit properly either.

After paying for a month, cancelling, and receiving confirmation of cancellation, Headspace has taken more money from my account. When I have tried to resolve this, they claimed they couldn't help me and I needed to ask for a refund through Google Play. However, suspiciously, Headspace took the payment directly from my account that time and not through Google Play. So I am stuck with a payment having gone through but no access to service.

I've been using this app for several years now and recently the loading time has increased significantly, maybe as a patience exercise but I just find my self leaving the app and doing meditation on my own, I would appreciate it if you could improve the loading time and decrease it, thanks for the years of good experience.

Fantastic meditations, theme and guides but they're held back by an incredibly frustrating app experience. was previously was 5 stars, updated to 1. recent update has bricked this app, it switched itself off after 3 minutes which deems any meditation or sleepcast useless. customer support has mostly been AI and not helpful. no timeline to fix issue, no suitable workarounds, no willingness to publicly admit that there is a known issue.

Very buggy and slow to load since the "redesign." Loading the home screen takes ages now, and my go-to sleepcast will stop playing after 60 seconds some nights. Terrible it is like it does not anymore
no longer syncing to Google fit. critical for any of us with vitality insurance. used to work great.

I love this app but it is buggy. currently, I get a message pop up saying I'm offline and can only play certain content - despite the fact that I'm online and am playing content I haven't downloaded. the error message cannot be gotten rid of either. it'll disrupt video. hover over my stress check ins - meaning I can't do it. it renders a lot of app functions useless. please fix this asap. been an ongoing issue for 4 months.
A £50 meditation app that takes a minute to load a simple UI and crashes halfway through a meditation. Shockingly poor quality.
I love the app but it glitches a lot during using it. It will crash sometimes once or twice during meditation and sleep casts.
used to be great but now glitches with every use

Excellent customer support. I was like a lot of other reviewers having issues with the app not working, specifically during mediation it would stop playing once my screen locked. I emailed their support email and got a response within an hour or 2. The email communication was prompt and super helpful, and now the app works fine. You need to adjust your phone's battery app settings if you're having issues and it will solve the problem. or reach out to their support email, they are great.

Have loved using Headspace, especially the focus music and soundscapes (originally gave a 5* review) but the last few months have been frustrating- the app is constantly freezing and glitching making it hard to complete a session. Customer service team suggested using the website whilst they try to fix but it's not the same interface and experience. Really hoping they get it sorted, but I'm unlikely to renew my subscription in April unless it's fixed because currently it's too unreliable.

For a few months now the app will crash about 75 seconds after playing, claiming I'm offline. I have to close the app, turn off the WiFi and mobile data, turn it all back on again and then it will work. Not a very relaxing experience.

content is great when the app works. most of the time the app doesnt open on the first, second or third time. Content stops due to 'no signal' but my wifi is fine - especially annoying when using the sleepcasts
WORST experience ive had with an app. It simply never works.

This app is now completely terrible. I am just venting really as I see many others have left a review about the same issue of the app just cutting out mid meditation every time. I contacted the customer service, did everything they said and it is still the same. It is such a shame as it used to really help me with my anxiety and insomnia issues, now it just makes them worse. It has been like this for over a month now, will it ever be fixed?
works great until it keeps freezing for hours on end, takes minutes to load options, or just blacks out. reached out to support and instead of helping me they offered a refund - very disappointing

I wish there was an option for gentle music behind the meditation leader's speaking. And I wish they would tell you when it's over so I know it's the end and don't think it's just another pause. I wish it were easier to find just short meditations and I don't like the constant prompt to "check in."
I didn't want to do this painful review. I like you a lot, because I've watched the Netflix series. But you must warn that a PAID account is needed to access the services featured in this app.

keeps jamming!

Have to force stop and reopen the app several times just to get it to load, and thats only if I have the patience. I won't use it, which is unfortunate because I really liked this app a few years ago. Too bad they don't offer refunds. Now I'm stuck paying for an app that doesn't work properly.

Frustratingly Unstable. Recently every time we try to use the sleep casts they seem to stop after 3 minutes, and requires a cache clearing to resolve. This makes the app very frustrating and unreliable, which is not conducive to good sleep.

The app is pretty unusable on my phone (Samsung). It takes forever to open and then moving around the different tabs and pages, each one takes ages. I have been after decent length meditations to start the day but can only find three minute ones. Not worth the money at all.

I love Headspace, I am a subscriber for more than 5 years, but if it's not fixed I will need to cancel it and move to another service, as the app is not fit for purpose at the moment.
cutting out and not working way too often unfortunately.

Been using headspace for years and it has a really great library. But since a recent big update to the app layout it's just frustrating to use. Navigation is slow, every new page I have to wait for it to load. Regularly decided I'm offline and stops playing, and finding the options to play downloaded audios is a chore, why is it hidden? I mainly use it for sleep too so having the dedicated sleep tab on the bottom menu be replaced with their ai chatbot that I'll never touch did not please me.

Although I love the potential content this app offers, it crashes more often than not, and I haven't even been able to explore it fully bc it just won't load. Terribly disappointing, especially considering the cost.
Love the app but with all the added stuff in recent years the app has become extremely slow and glitchy.
it's glitchy and customer service doesn't exist. this app used to be good but since the last update it's freezing up and not working.
To many bugs...Explore screen loading too long or not loading at all and showing the home screen instead, meditation failing with an error, history showing duplicated meditation..
The fact that it become so slow, so I need to wait a minute to load a single video its stressing me out more than relaxing.

Used to be great. For weeks now, anything I play will randomly stop anywhere from 2 to 40 minutes in and say something went wrong. It started doing that right when everything started taking forever to load. 30+ seconds to load the home screen, another 30+ seconds to go to browse. 30+ seconds when I click on something to listen to. I don't like that one? 30+ seconds to load the browse screen again. This is on Wifi when everything on any other app loads instantly.

Where did this app go so wrong? Between fundamental app functionality, vague feature bloat and brutal paywalling, I feel like Headspace has moved away from it's mission. The single biggest issue is that meditations keep cutting out. This is the absolute core of the app and it simply doesn't work for me. No buffering, no pause, a hard stop and then you have to restart the meditation. And because of the silences in the meditation, you often can't even tell it's cut out.

just what is the point of a guided winding down meditation if it stops playing evry 2 minutes?! interrupting your flow and you have to start it each time from beginning again? It ends up winding you up.

Same as others have said. Used to be great but it's so glitchy and slow now it gets me more stressed trying to use it! The layout is messy and cluttered and difficult to find what you want. No one is asking for AI in a headspace app. Please give us one safespace away from it! Considering switching to another app on renewal as it's been functioning poorly for ages with no fix update.
forces you to create an account before you can view the subscription plans.

Everyone keeps saying how the app is crashing... well I can't even get INTO the app. I tried uninstalling several times. This app is been slow and buggy like this for months, such a shame they haven't corrected the issues yet. Also the UI is so bad now is to focused on AI. Please make a separate app for people who want AI / doctor/ therapist/ workout features. It's too much, please focus on what you're good at. Pull all this new stuff into a new app so we can meditate without being overwhelmed.

The content itself is amazing, but the app itself isn't great. It always buffers and takes forever to load anything. Especially when im trying to use ambience noise to go to bed and it immediately cuts 5 minutes in.

My daughter loves this app and uses it every night to fall asleep, but BEWARE! Last month, the app used over 5GB of data in one evening, even though we keep our mobile data setting turned off. we subscribe to data on that device since it is always connected to wifi, so it resulted in $60 of extra charges! A quick search revealed that Leads pace can suffer glitches which result in excessive amounts of data being used in the background. if you use this app, make sure you don't have data limits.

Liked it at first but the app is trash now. multiple meditations messed up because it decides I don't have internet in the middle of it (I do). on the plus side I sat for some unknown periods of time before realizing. 10 seconds to load every screen for some reason. just terrible programming, I suspect they are probably shortcutting with AI.

Ever since they overhauled this app last year it's been useless. It takes forever to load, assuming it ever does, and it frequently informs me I'm offline even though I'm not. I start sessions and talking stops a minute in with an "oops something went wrong." Yes what went wrong is your coders. You need a new development team or better yet toss out this new version and go back to the old one. It worked fine. BTW I'm a 10 year lifetime member so I've seen all the transformations.
Keeps stopping meditation in the middle of the runtime.

This app keeps trying to take $75 58 out of my account Repeatedly And I Cancelled the subscription Before the free trial period was over! be aware that they will try to Steal 75 bucks less than 2 weeks after u install this app and the trial period is supposed to be 14 days!!!! apps like this cause poor folks much more stress than they relieve lol Seriously though!!!!

replyContent: Hi Riy, thank you so much for your feedback! We've been made aware of this issue and are working to resolve it. Please be sure to keep your app up to date! We appreciate your patience as we determine a solution.

content: 3% meditations, 97% paywall

I've used headspace for several years. in the last single year it has become the most error ridden sad excuse of an app. it's almost ironic. I've done all of the possible troubleshooting and the app insists I have no connection. It stops in the middle of a meditation saying it lost service. you don't know this until you open your eyes to look at the app. Opening the app used to take 2-3 seconds. now it takes 20-30 and that's if it even loads! I even pre-download meditations and it STILL errors.

What has happened to this app? I've been using it for over 2 years and recently, it has become unusable. Like many people have already said, not only does it consistently say "Something went wrong" after 2 minutes, the interface is incredibly slow, and it keeps telling me I'm offline when I'm absolutely not. The app needs to work again before time is spent adding new features.
great app. but please fix the load time at start (opening the app) lately it's terrible.
this app constantly stops. I've uninstalled and reinstalled and still happens. it's a shame because I enjoy it when it does work

I've used this app for over 8 years now. I find meditation pretty life changing, and it's really helpful for me and has become part of my daily routine. The last few years it's gotten incredibly buggy and slow. Because I use it all the time, especially when I'm not doing so well mentally, it's so frustrating when the app doesn't load or a meditation crashes halfway through. This happens a lot and it's enough to make me consider leaving the app.
keeps crashing mid session and taking ages to load up. totally unusable at the moment

I think the AI feature needs to be looked at, possibly removed. Performance of this app has plummeted since adding it. having the same "connectivity" issues as basically everyone else has been having. so disruptive when your stream gets cut off suddenly. I love this app. Ive been subscribed for 10 years. please. bring it back to what it was.

this app is ok when it's working but it's so incredibly slow and buggy that it has the opposite effect of what it's whole purpose is. an app to reduce stress that actually increases it! I'm on a free membership thankfully because I would not be at all happy if I was paying for this. hasn't synced with Google fit for months despite trying various fixes, meaning I'm losing out on vitality reward points.

a very good and useful app overall, but there is the issue that when you use it for hours on end it tends to stop mid-audio forcing you to restart the whole thing which generally is fine but it tends to mess with the interface. Mein Account ist offenbar defekt. Egal was man versucht, es erscheint ständig nur die Meldung „Ups, da ist etwas schiefgelaufen“. Keine konkrete Fehlerbeschreibung, keine Lösung. Für einen App die so viel Geld kostet geht das gar nicht.

It's nice if you can pay, but when I try to find any free options there aren't any available to me, perhaps because I cancelled a subscription previously and this is their attempt at getting me back in. Too costly just for a meditation app - can't believe how a guy who use to be a monk really try to monetize the supposed to be free practice like meditation this badly, viewers should def switch to the Medito app instead.

Why does everything take soo long to load??😭😭 Tryna teach me patience, are you?🥲 Please fix it you guys!!

Love this App! It has helped me so much in such a short time. Totally worth the price. I am excited to watch it grow.

Headspace has a great concept, but the execution falls short. The app frequently loads very slowly, which is especially frustrating when you’re trying to relax or meditate. I probably would have ended someone's existence in my current job, were it not for Headspace. So thanks yall very much for keeping me sane 😂 Nah, I joke, most days are not *that* bad... mostly 👀 But in one way or another, I am really glad to have found this app.

App is so glitchy. Takes ages to open. Hangs with the blank spaces for the sections. Click on explore and half the time it shows the home screen again. Forever having to close the app and reopen to get it to work. Last night the sleep casts kept stopping a minute or so in. Not very soothing!

While i'd love to give this app a higher rating, I think there is a fundamental issue in it not detecting internet when all other apps are detecting Internet and working well. I have no clue how their service is so poor but maybe it's their servers or the Bandwidth they have!

buggy, crashes, takes forever to load

been useing headspace for a few years now but the recent update has ruined the quality, takes so much longer to load, didnt actaully improve anything, and now it crashes 1-5 min into each session. UPDATE: 2026 -Ive had this app for about 6yrs, it WAS amazing. A recent update has now made it constantly glitch & drop within minutes of starting With seemingly no viable solution. the meditations and content itsself is nice, it helps me calm down most of the time and does exactly what it's meant for, but the app itsself isn't great. I love Headspace... but I've noticed a serious decline The app is constantly crashing, I'll start a meditation/ sleep music and then it will abruptly stop, claiming 'you're offline' ( so it should be able to run offline even if I was), the loading times are significantly longer in the app when trying to go through the list of videos. It's far more frustrating than relaxing than it should be. The desktop version, is buggy with the login user verification screen loading to the home page.
I love the program itself, but the app keeps stopping saying I'm not connected to the Internet. it's interrupting my meditations.
kicks in and out disrupts meditation experience may have to cancel please advise

"Oh dear, something's wrong." I have paid for annual membership for years and use this app daily for sleep stories and sounds as well as meditation. it bugs out every day now (Android). I'm not sure why the quality of the app has decreased so much. It's jarring to have a sleep story fail while trying to fall asleep. 8-hr radios fail before they're over. Task switching causes issues. Headspace is great, but the app is a PAIN. For nearly a month now, every meditation session abruptly stops with a "you appear to be offline" message, and it'll kick me out of the meditation. Nothing makes meditating more difficult than having to open your eyes to check if you're on a quiet part or your phone's back on the home screen again. I also find the AI "helper" in a mental-health app very distasteful.
Love the App - really helps me unwind. Have found app crashing after latest Samsung/Android update. Often says it is not online?

Been using this for a long time. The meditations are still great (if you can find what you're looking for). I’ve been using this app for quite some time. It was always somewhat buggy and inconvenient, but lately, it has become a complete disaster. At this point, I no longer trust the app, and it’s unusable in its current state.

It's hard to believe that a successful programme such as headspace has such a poor app. It takes a very long time to load, freezes frequently and, what annoys me the most, stops working mid meditation every single time I'm using it. doesnt not sync with google fit. The new update imterface is not good.

Unfortunate they are using ai now. I really liked how human the company used to feel. Updates to the app have also slow it down significantly, it takes ages for things to lead now. on top of that, a connection issue has made it so content just doesn't load past a few minutes even when connectedto wifi or data.
I used to say this was 5 stars, but they redesigned their "Today" page and it doesn't have a nice relaxing daily flow of content any more.

I have used and loved this app for years. I have over 900 sessions logged. Lately, it has been so buggy that it causes more stress than it relieves. It often crashes in the midst of a meditation and says my device is offline when it clearly isn't. If they don't fix this soon, I'm going to need to find a different app.
No longer works - crashes after about 1 minute on all sleep stories.

I have had this app for many years and it has been extremely glitchy lately. Just like other reviews state, I often get a message that I am offline, that something went wrong. Content takes a while to load. interface changed at some point and is less intuitive now. there were used to be "the wake up" videos which had amazing footage of nature and great scripts accompanying it, but those no longer exist.

I've been using the app daily, long time subscriber but recently every single meditation crashes. Currently the app is completely unuseable. Unfortunately I will have to cancel my subscription. Very disappointed.
useless, have to pay to use anything. RONT DOWNLOAD
Like the content, but the app is just terrible since the update, content takes so long to load, it keeps crashing, please please fix it cause it's borderline unusable

The content is good but the app is quite glitch. even with super fast internet, it takes a while to load and recently has started crashing few minutes into meditation making it difficult to use it reliably.
I've been using this app for years and it's been great, but the last few months I haven't been able to get any of my meditations to play longer than a few minutes. Definitely frustrating

I typically use the sleep portion of the app. I love the sleep casts and the sleep sounds. What I don't love is the app crashing every time I open it, or stopping playback less than 2 minutes into anything I play. I am connected to wifi, it shouldn't be disconnecting all the time. It really pulls me from drifting off to have whatever I'm playing abruptly stop.

6 days in, I already feel a difference with my focus and overall understanding of mindfulness & wellbeing. **I'm 102 days in & updating my review. I took away 2 stars. The app consistently freezes in the middle of a meditation. I have to restart it once or twice to get through it. The biggest issue was having 2 different coaches cancel on me the same day of the appointment, just 3 weeks apart of each other. Don't really want to book again. I was a big advocate for this app with co-workers.

Was a great app, have been a user for nearly 6 years and suddenly there's nothing but glitches - sleepcasts abruptly stopping with an error, slow loading of pages and constant errors listening to anything. What's going on??
it keeps losing audio stream. you can't trust it and the inconsistency in the software undermines the whole experience. waste of time and not meditative.

I really miss when this app just worked without any issues. it seems that they are trying to destroy it by making the app unusable after the rebrand. I work in tech and would never allow such a flawed update go to production. I've been using this app since 2017, and now my meditation experience is really hurt by this broken app.

I really enjoy this app and its a really helpful rescource for mindfulness. however, the app has become really buggy recently, and my meditation is interrupted several times by "something went wrong" notifications. It ruins the entire experience of meditation and leaves you frustrated rather than relaxed. this must be sorted out asap, otherwise the app becomes completely pointless.

Used to love this app and its been incredibly good for my health. Sadly the recent updates have effectively rendered it unusable with constant crashing and off-line messages. Please roll back or do something headspace... you'll destroy your own business if this continues 😞

This was a fantastic app. Over the last year or so it's become a jumble of AI slop. I don't think the developers care about quality. They just want to sell it to companies, so that those companies can tick a box to say they're investing in their employees well-being. Whether the app is any good doesn't really matter. If you want to get really stressed out, try chatting with the inbuilt AI bot "Ebb". It will soon have you convinced there's nothing real about your existence to look forward to.
replyContent: Thank you so much for taking the time to share your feedback about the Ebb reflection tool. If you would like to learn more about our guiding principles for AI at Headspace, please visit https://www.headspace.com/ai

content: nice idea, many options, different speakers. the app is the problem not the product: loading times r unacceptable, huge delay between pressing an icon and the app responding. today i got 3 error messages and the course stopped, i tried a different course, but same issue here after 1:20 min. it's my last day of free trial and i wont recommend it.

Not so Free Trial. I attempted to sign up for a free trial, but it glitched and ended up skipping the free trial, locking in my payment for the year. I have reached out to customer service twice, explaining what happened and that I had the app less than 36 hours, so I would have been well within my free trial period. They just keep saying all sales are final. Reading what other people have said suggests this is not uncommon occurrence. They put money and rigid rules above people and compassion
