Love this app! Mostly use it for sleepcasts. Lately though, its been crashing a lot. barely runs for 2 mins and then stops. Please fix it. we dont need more sleepcasts. we need the existing ones to run fine. Quality over Quantity. hope you guys are listening
stops working a few moments into every single sleepcast/ sleep music. which makes it unusable and the absolute opposite of calming and helping you drift to sleep...

i downloaded to look at the library of things like music, soundscapes, noises, and other things to improve my sleep. In all the sections I looked at every single one was paid. There's almost no point if you don't pay
App is not loading the screen

User for almost 10 years. It used to be a great app. I still love the content but the app no longer functions without errors/issues. Due to this, I rarely use it anymore so I sadly will be canceling at the end of my subscription.

I love it. but, Half of the app is literally Premium!! like only one thing is free. if you guys want many money, then try posting about your app in social media without making it expensive. you've lost one person using headspace. I downloaded it because my mental health was bad cause someone on TikTok recommended me it. but I guess that they were wrong.
used to really like the app. but recently its so buggy and crashes all the time. super frustrating.

Headspace have ruined this App, as a long time user who has found it valuable it is now frustrating and keeps stopping or telling me I'm off line. WAKE UP HEADSPACE STOP MUCKING YOUR ANDRIOD CUSTOMERS AROUND OR SOON YOU WONT HAVE ANY!
suddenly taking ages to load...
不好用
uninstalled it

I've been using this for years and recommending it to others as well. But with the latest update, it's become unusable. It just freezes on the home screen and won't load anything. Big disappointment. Please fix this quickly! Edited 9/1/26: no longer freezing on the home screen but still taking ages to load and then frequently just crashes a couple of minutes into sleep casts. C'mon, Headspace, sort this out! My annual subscription has just renewed otherwise I really would be looking elsewhere.

used to love it, but the app is so buggy. Very slow to open, things I'm listening to just stop with a "something went wrong" error. I have a premium account but not keen to renew unless things improve. shame.
Great app but recently is stopping in the middle of sessions showing me an error.
very buggy. keeps saying I'm offline but I'm not and is slow to load

i purchase yearly subscription. i am having problems every night. app saying I off line when I have WiFi cover. app constantly freezing. I requested refund having followed all the app suggestions to resolve issue to no avail. was refused the refund. contacted PayPal explained above. PayPal acknowledged and confirmed they would refund within 2 minutes of contact. thank you paypal. Will never subscribe to headspace again even though I renewed yearly subscription since 2017. now have calm app.

This app used to have free stuff for people to listen to who couldn't afford a plan and why did yall remove the AI that you could vent to? That was like the best free part about this app and now that its gone its totally useless to me now.

Been using this app for years, but having issues lately. Customer service had been helpful but the problem lies with the app - the daily meditations are stopping themselves, and it's been an annoying process. Thinking of changing apps.
Literally EVERYTHING is locked behind a paywall.

Thought this would be a nice alternative to Calm when my employer included this in our benefits, but the UI is much worse and, most importantly, when I try to do a meditation, it stops after a minute (if that) and says I am offline when I know I am not. Skimmed some reviews and others seem to have the same issue, which makes the app useless. I have used free and paid versions of Calm off and on for years and never had this issue.

Expensive nearly one hundred dollars per year? $20 per month, at this rate my power bill is a relief. Worldwide Web should NOT be so GREEDY ppl Are suffering with no relief they can afford in this WEB system full of spiders ready to pounce on us. Instead give freely as Jesus did and see what happens when God approves❣️🙏🙌❤️
Login issues and no support offered; avoid signing up for the yearly plan because then nobody will refund you

so frustrating. constantly telling me I'm phone, crashes, stalls .... been using Headspace for years but it's so buggy. hangs while trying to load pages let alone actual mediations and constantly just stopping in the middle of poo practises. I've been paying for the App since 2017 and seriously considering quitting.

The main thing I'm mindful of is frustration. The latest updates made the app slow to respond, but it's now unusable, stopping after about 90 secs, showing as offline. I loved it initially and paid for the full version. Sleepcasts and mindful cardio are great. I would've found it useful if the cardio section was extended,and the mindful runs included longer sessions.Emails to cust ser were swiftly answered, responses were helpful. If the glitches are fixed, I'll definitely use it again.

I love this app and their meditations, it helps me through my day with more calm and managing anxiety moments. The only thing I don't like is I can't reset the meditation packages, if I want to start again I have to do it manually and remember which session is next ! Please improve that
had to update it since the app has turned into absolute molasses. takes 30 seconds to load each page.
Meditation discontinues randomly several times per session. pretty annoying to set it up a and get settled again. never happened to me on Calm. also the UI can be pretty inintuitive.

I have been using this app during 2 years, but It's working bad lately. The sessions suddenly stop because it says I have no connection, which isn't true. I'd like this fixed soon so I can continue using it normally.
Every meditation session crushes. Reinstalling didn't help. Counter productive for a meditation/ mindfulness app. Sadly, I'll have to cancel my membership after 5 years

Unfortunately, I had to change my review from 5 stars to 3. It was once an awesome app, but it's now too much. It's overwhelming, and the worst part is that it's really buggy. It doesn't load, it's slow, and always shows that you are offline even though I have perfect internet. I'm missing the app from 9 years ago. It feels like it lost what it was supposed to be. Still a good idea and it's still a good app for your mental health. I hope there will be a simpler version like it was before.

the app has alot of great content in theory, I cannot access it due to the app being too buggy. the content will shut off in the first 30 seconds even with downloaded content wich obviously makes my anxiety much worse. I was told by support that this was a known issue and to try using the website instead wich is also buggy and will buffer even when I have a strong connection. I hope this issue is solved soon because i really like this app and would find the content very beneficial if it worked

I find this app unusable this days. Every time I try to use it now it takes ages to load and then when I play a sleepcast, it stops after a few mins with an error. I've had an update in December and hoped it was sorted, but it still does it. very frustrating when you're trying to go to sleep
it's glitchy. since the last update, I've had to uninstall and reinstall 3 times. the mediation stops when my phone screen turns off. i get error messages. the explore tab doesn't work.

content is excellent but you can't get to any of it because the app has been ruined. It freezes, crashes or stops mid flow. so gutting. I've paid for subscription for a few years now and I haven't had any communication saying "sorry, we are having difficulties" or "sorry you aren't getting what you paid for" ironically becoming quite stressful

Sleepcasts keep turning off. Opposite of relaxing. I have the premium membership so even more frustrating that you can't use the content you're paying for. I thought it was just my phone at first but have updated the app and now see other reviews from the past few months raising the same point. There's no response from the Headspace team so it makes me question whether they're even aware of the bug to even fix it.

I really enjoy the contents of this app but the latest updates have me reconsidering my subscription. the app is so slow and constantly crashing. They also implemented haptic feedback for navigation without any way to opt out of the vibrations. I confirmed with support there is no in app setting to turn this off and it overrides your device's vibration setting. They also said they would not be able to pass this onto dev so I'm leaving a review.

Not able to try anything without signing up to the trial! I wanted to see what the voices were like as I prefer British accents. Know the founder is British, but don't know if would like his voice. First intro video was American accent which isn't for me. Also the visuals looked off on my S22 Ultra, images on buttons appearing squashed and malformed. Uninstalled.

nothing is free on this app. I think mental health should be more accessible for people with little to no income such as teens and children. mental health is not only for adults or the rich, it's for everyone. I should be able to work on myself with a decent app without having to pay. I couldn't use a single thing in the app without needing a subscription

I've used headspace for years, but over the past few/several months it has become quite glitchy. Takes a long time for things to load and very often I get an error part way through a meditation. I've made sure I have the most current version and was being patient thinking maybe a fix was coming, but now I am about to cancel my subscription and delete the app due to the issues which seem to be increasing.

I'm an android user and agree with so many others that the app is so slow that's almost unusable. I listen to sleepcasts but they frequently fail after a short while. Paying for the subscription I don't expect this. It used to be very responsive but it's got worse and worse recently.

This stupid app is full of bugs that make it frustrating and unusable recently. If I play a meditation it will literally never go 2 minutes without "losing internet connection" and restarting from the beginning (my internet runs perfectly and this happens on wifi or data). Plus it takes 10+ seconds to load when opened, and again EVERY time it loads a new page. with a $100 subscription and all the recent reviews saying the same thing, I canceled, even after having it for 2 yrs.

too much explaining, too little actual meditation. I can't believe they don't have box breathing! the interface is confusing and disorganized. I tried Calm and this doesn't even come close. Disappointed 😞

Great content, but app is unreliable. Headspace has really good meditations and teachers, but the Android app keeps dropping the connection mid‑session and the audio just stops without any clear end to the meditation. This is especially frustrating because you often can’t tell if it’s a long silence or the app has stopped, so sessions turn into endless meditations with no proper ending. Until the stability issues are fixed, it’s hard to recommend despite the strong content.

Quality has reduced! I used to love this app, and would use it for both meditating and sleep casts. Nowadays, I find that the app takes forever to load, and gives me the circle of death. I thought this was my wifi/data connection, but it's been consistently poor in different environments. At night, my sleep casts cut out after a 5-10 minutes. Nothing worse than fiddling with your phone when you're trying to fall asleep. So disappointing.
Too many popups, notifications, interruptions for an app that's designed to help you relax.

I have been using headspace for many years and like the content. Unfortunately, the app has become an obstacle to access the great content. The app stops constantly during sessions. Pls release upgrades after they have been thoroughly tested. It's such a shame, I need to look for alternatives.
its rlly good but the problem is is that you need to pay for all the meditations but everyone is saying that it helped them alot but it doesn't have any free meditations so idk anymore
Forces account creation, so I’m unable to even check the app’s features.

I had loved this app for a while, but about four months ago I stopped my subscription because I was pushed to use Ebb, their AI, so much. At first I had used it, but once I became more educated I felt that the ethics of AI don't align with my meditation goals so I uninstalled. Also, at the time of quitting the app, the glitching menus and inaccurate timing on refreshing my content began to be annoying since it would refresh at night instead of in the morning.

look I've used this app before when I was younger and it was fine but now they locked everything behind a price there is barley any free and if they are there not what I'm looking for I just want to calm down and sleep
sleep casts run a few minutes then stop with an error message.
I would like to rate it higher because the concept is wonderful BUT it crashes alot, daily and it impacts the whole concept of being mindful when it stops working mid meditation....

i love headspace. It currently keeps showing an error message though, mid-meditation and stops playing, which renders it useless. I uninstalled and reinstalled it and that hasn't resolved it. please check if there's a bug!
replyContent: Thank you for reaching out. We are sorry for the trouble. Please send us a note to help@headspace.com and we'd be happy to assist further.

content: Update 2025: I have used Headspace regularly for years and even gave it a 5 star review in 2022. But recent bugs in the app have rendered it practically unusable. Pages take ages to load, it is hard to find the content that you want and then when a mediation finally loads, an error occurs and it stops. Very frustrating! Have contacted the support but they were no help at all.

Very rich catalogue, great tools, very appealing interface, lots of gliches recently. It keeps saying "you are offline" when I am not (other apps work fine) and it gives me the error message "not responding" everytime I try and access the full catalogue. The track some times stops midway for no reason.
ķeeps crashing and saying I am not connected to the Internet when I am
it was not calming at all ALMOST EVERYTHING COST MONEY like why does it cost money to make yourself calm and happy, this was so annoying so I immediately uninstalled.
I can confirm the constant crashing of the app. I used it a few years ago and it went perfect, but now it crashes as soon as the screen lock turns on.

Application always freezes and I was unable to finish sessions. When you meditate at the morning when every minute counts it becomes awful experience. Taking into account application purpose it looks quite ironic. Uninstalled it.
you have to pay for everything in this app. It should just be a paid app instead of everything is an in app purchase. disappointing

I started Headspace in 2015 and it truly helped me heal and become a more grounded person. Back then, it was simple, yet it felt curated. Sometime around 2023 I used it less and less and I think I know why: decision fatigue. Now when I open the app, i feel bombarded with so many options, all competing for attention. Opening Headspace actually made me stressed! I will always love Headspace, but until they make the UI more calming, I may cancel when my subscription ends.
keeps clitching which is the opposite to relaxing
app is hopless crashing all the time,can't get any help with it.Very poor app sadly

The app broke and says Im offline when Im not. I opened a ticket with them and they basically said "yea we dont know why this is happening and you're not getting a refund." I read online that this is happening with other users as well.
been using it for 3 days...its the worst performing app in my phone. it is struggling to even launch. not planning to continue after 2week free trial. clearly its a trap

I wanted to try this app so I used the 7 day free trial This app wasn't what I thought it was. So I cancelled my subscription before the 7 day trial. They charged me what I am thinking is the most expensive package they have They charged me $69.99 A year worth of nothing I wanted I asked for a refund They won't do it I haven't even opened the app I haven't used any of there services I am so mad If you read the reviews they say the app doesn't even work half of the time I just want my money back
I'm not paying money to do breathing exercises👎

App performance has been awful lately. its slow to load. it's the only app on my phone that will say I have no internet connection. once it does load, sleep casts will play for a minute before crashing. will be demanding a full refund if these issues are not resolved ASAP.

pretty useless. I find much more helpful meditations on YouTube for free than any of the ones I've done here. These meditations are pretty redundant, basic, and just barely scratch the surface of what one could experience, explore, &/or heal with guided sessions. Also, the way the content library is organized feels very sloppy.

the content itself is good, however it consistently states there is no connection despite all other media platforms working perfectly fine on the same device. there is supposedly an option for downloading the content to combat this yet I have never found it in the entire year I've started using it.
The app has become really slow and buggy ever since they added their silly AI element. It just gets worse and more cluttered and unfocused the more they try to push the AI and therapy on their users.
Crashes often in the middle of a meditation. That's the most frustrating thing. There's also not a lot of new or innovative meditation content. Planning on unsubscribing after years of using.

The more it updates the worse it works. I've had headspace for years. 1) the meditations & Wake Up are all recycled; barely anything new. 2) what is "new" is new curations of the same stuff. 3) a few years ago it went in a super corporate direction, really focusing on attracting companies and suburbans. 4) with new updates it lags, loads slow, crashes often!!! 5) and disconnects consistently!!! it is nearly impossible to use. despite many reports, they aren't trying to fix it. time to move on.
constantly crashing during sessions. i am moving onto using YouTube for mediation.
poor connection to wifi from app. states app is offline every day while trying to use it. not supportive for anxiety at all.

2017: Great app. The foundation packs are a great start, and now I have subscribed there are more packs to help with sleep, anxiety, and more. 5 star. 2025: I have come back to this app, and I am really disappointed. Several times the audio just stops mid-meditation. I regularly get a pop-up telling me I am offline, yet I can access everything, and my meditation history isn't syncing with my Google Fit. I'm glad I only subscribed for a month.

This app is pointless. There one single video you can watch without paying. Everything is locked behind the subscription. According to the creators of this app you're only allowed to relieve stress so long as you pay if not then you don't deserve to be calm. I would give it zero stars if possible. Definitely do not recommend.
Very good app, really helpful, as good as Calm, if not better. Less buggy than Calm too. Helps me meditate and calm my anxiety :)
app constantly crashing and will take a long time to load, whether on wifi or data.
App constantly tells me I am offline (despite other apps working with internet). Really buggy.

Been using this app daily for 5+ years and loved it until recently. Lately my meditation session plays for a minute or two then stops and says "something went wrong" and "you're now offline" when I know I'm not. I've contacted support and followed all directions to fix this problem but it's still happening. I now have to download a meditation session to get through it without stopping by I can't figure out how to download sleepcasts. Previously 5 stars, now 1 star.
Good meditation app

this app is getting worse and worse. I love the actual meditations. the sleep content was especially important for me over the last almost 5 years I've been using it. Recently the app is starting to really fail. it takes forever to start up or doesn't at all, it says I'm offline when I'm not, and this AI therapy junk takes up a ton of space in the app. I've been paying a subscription for this app for many years now. I don't think it's a lot to ask that it actual functions. + Boo AI!

like the content, but really bad app. incredibly slow and hangs often. no what I expect from an app I used to manage stress. edit: cancelling subscription as app is unusable when I need to Samsung Galaxy s24
devs need to meditate on buggy slow app and pc interface. content ok but poorly organized and hidden behind frequent pop up alerts. i am venting, breathing in, hold, out. ok i feel better now :)

I've used this app a lot for a few years as I particularly rely on the sleepcasts and soundscapes at night time. However, lately the app has become very slow and buggy. The sound quality on a lot of the sleepcasts is very poor and soundscapes often cut out much earlier than they should. These issues have existed for a while, so it's even more frustrating that Headspace have decided to add a superfluous AI chatbot instead of focusing their attention on the basic functionality.
Great content but the app is barely functional. It now thinks I'm constantly offline and when I am able to access content, it constantly crashes. This needs fixing asap...

This is the only app that enrages me! Constantly crashing, takes ages to load, says I'm offline and stops playing, even when my connection is fine. I have used the Headspace app since the start and they have ruined it by making it so cluttered. No room for "headspace" when there's pop ups, freezes, recommendations that I'm not interested in. Some of the voices of the Sleepcasts are horrible and are really grating too. Such a shame.

The content has been great, but I had to cancel the subscription. The app constantly says, "you are offline." Whenever it worked, I put the content offline, but then when I come back the next day, the voice is completely different from the one I was using. I'm a tech guy; I come here to relax, not to troubleshoot tech issues. I found this horrible and I ended up being more stressed than before using the app.
Not syncing to Google fit Made a complaint and they are aware back in November and still not fix this issue. Not really good enough
constantly says looks like you are off line. sessions crash.

I adore Headspace as a service, but the app has been problematic ever since the most recent major UI change. What happens is either the UI doesn't load, or I'll start a meditation and it'll randomly stop after a few minutes. I delete the app's cache and data, sign back in, and it loads the old UI. Everything works perfect in the old UI. After a few days it loads the new UI without asking. Usually within a day or two, problems start again. Rinse and repeat every 5-10 days.
Love the aesthetics of the UI and so many great tools!

good content, but my experience of the app itself is poor. I recently uninstalled it and restarted my phone (as recommended in the faq), but despite this, the app is extremely laggy, and needs to be force closed a couple of times per night (I mainly use it for sleepcasts). It also just randomly stops the sleepcasts from playing, giving a connection error, despite having very good wifi in my bedroom. its becoming unusable unfortunately.
UI bad - the app is not intuitively organized, it takes forever to load some pages, help is always days away, and it keeps kicking me off my company/health provider plan.

I really enjoy headspace as a tool and benefit from the meditations and supporting my practice - but the app at the moment is awful. painfully slow, constantly crashing, and telling me I don't have any internet. I sincerely hope this can be resolved soon as it's not cheap. edit: downgraded to two stars as it's currently unusable

i have deleted the app as it has so many bugs, repeatedly cutting off meditations while i'm doing them. i have done what they suggest, deleted the app, switched phone on and off, reinstalled multiple times but it still does the same thing. such a shame because the content is excellent. i now use the web page on my phone to get to the meditations. not perfect either but at least the meditations don't crash.
It has been a little help, however it has recently started crashing a lot.

I'm sorry to be giving this rating as a user of over two years. The content is five stars but the glitches and bugs (I am an android user) have made the app unusable. Even before this latest downturn a couple of months ago which has made the issues worse and more frequent, I would regularly use my run streak aa the app wouldn't work for a day or two. I find a run streak really motivating and it would have been nice to see a full 365 days. Instead on days where it froze, I would find alternative

App stops playing or crashes constantly on Pixel 9A. Phone 100% charged, using home wifi, good 5G cell service, battery optimization OFF, and meditations downloaded, play stops once my screen goes off. Additionally, most of the time I open the app the visuals are blank and I have to wait for the app. This is terrible and I experience nothing like this with any other apps, using downloads or online content for podcasts or music. This is extremely frustrating as I have been provided a full year.
Not as many options as I'd hoped. Only a few sleep meditations.

Scammed: got a -50% on black Friday, then got an email notification on renewal at discounted price. Instead, I was charged full price. -50% is always available if you try to cancel. Finally, was denied cancellation and refund. Content is too limited and repetitive to justify a subscription.

I paid for a 1-year subscription because I wanted to relieve stress, calm my mind, and achieve inner peace. You know, the usual human delusion. Instead, Headspace starts a meditation… and then stops two minutes later with a “network connection error.” Which is impressive, because nothing says “relax” like being yanked out of serenity to troubleshoot Wi-Fi like it’s 2009. So now my mindfulness routine goes like this: Inhale Exhale “Network connection error” Immediate rage

A long time user of headspace but really not loving the change of design. The app has continued to be slow to load and crashes often. I often have to close and reopen the app entirely for it to work. The revamped lay out feels overly cluttered, harder to navigate, and do not agree with incorporation of the Ebb feature. New ≠ better.

Ive been using this app religiously since it released back many years ago. It started out simple, but lately they've add so much nonsense and inflated content that I feel it's lost it's true use and purpose. My biggest problem now is my favorite packs have to be streamed, and are constantly randomly closed during the session without me knowing during the silent moments. I've tried downloading them but I still get technical difficulties.

I was very happy with my daily dose of Headspace. But halfway through December 2025 every meditation stops playing after a minute or so, with the app saying I'm offline, which I am certainly not. Use the website, they say, sure, that works, but does not have my list of favourites accessible. I know it's the holiday season, but I'm pretty sure I'd be called back to work if the main main main flow of our application wasn't working. Why am I even paying for this?...
replyContent: Sorry for any confusion with our newest update! You can access your current pack by looking under the "Meditate" tab and browsing through your Recents section. Hope this helps, but please don't hesitate to reach out to our team at help@headspace.com if you have any questions.

content: Too glitchy. Very frustrating 'app offline' error messages that strike at random. Impossible to know if a silence is real or because the track has crashed. Tough to truly relax when you're thinking about whether the app is still running or not.
Notifications haven't worked for a long time. Not sold on Ebb talking AI either find it very annoying - impossible to resume an old meditation.
replyContent: Thank you for your feedback! We're sorry to hear you aren't enjoying the new changes in the app, and will make sure to let our team know. Our goal at Headspace has always been to reach as many people as we can with the tools to help live healthier and happier lives. If you have any suggestions, please send our team an email at help@Headspace.com.

content: Loved the app previously but now it keeps crashing mid meditation, forcing me to restart the meditation and not contributing to my streak. Like others have said, it's extremely slow, and when I tried doing one of the pre-set courses it would keep asking me to restart it. Won't renew my subscription. Whatever they've done to the app they've made it terrible.

I downloaded this specifically for the various meditation options. The content is great, but I can't ever seem to get through an entire session without the app stopping. As soon as my phone locks, the playback stops. When I unlock my phone, an error message says "Something went wrong" or "you're now offline" and the only way I clear the errors is to close and reopen the app. no matter what, playback stops. Very frustrating. I considered subscribing but will not if these issues persist.
Please avoid this company for your own mental health. I was tricked into a repeat subscription and the company dismissed me when I tried to contact them to resolve the issue.

This used to be so reliable for white noise overnight, but lately it crashes constantly. So frustrating, and now I'm being woken every morning early by the trains without the white noise to interfere, so I've got to give up and find a Spotify playlist or something else. Disappointing, I relied on this for ages. Update this is happening all over again after it briefly got better. I need to find a new app to help with sleep because this cuts off from errors every 5 minutes.
replyContent: Sorry about the trouble with the app, we suggest a quick reinstall to help with this. If that doesn't work, please send us a note to help@headspace.com so we can further assist.

content: So buggy!!! The sleepcasts are basically unusable at the moment because they stop working within 30 seconds of starting them. Also if I'm in a mediation and pause it or jump onto another app on my phone it will kick me out of the mediation and I'll have to restart. Please fix!!!

App is so glitchy. SO GLITCHY. and Visual layout is confusing, not at all intutiive, and everytying is hard to find. Worse of all - you can't make playlists of continuous meditations. Once 1 session is over, that's it. So you can't make sleep playlists that play all night like you can on calm.
Used to use this every day. Latest version errors out every time, not even worth opening the app. Tried re-installing. Disappointing.
Too expensive

Warning about Headspace customer service and refund experience I wanted to share a recent experience with Headspace in case it helps others manage expectations around their customer service and refund policies. Headspace’s content is good, but customer service was incredibly frustrating. I requested a refund and spent days in back‑and‑forth emails with different agents, none taking ownership or offering a clear solution. In the end, I had to escalate with my credit card company.
I never get to the end of a meditation or soundscape as the app just crashes. Not going to renew subscription

I was listening to one of the sessions yesterday and fell asleep half way through. Not only did I miss 10 whole minutes of the session, I woke up to a half used candle! D*mn your smooth voice Andy. Nevertheless, I give this app 5/5. (p.s. I was struggling to fall sleep this week so this is a positive review and... to anyone lighting candles during a session, do so with caution so as to avoid a fire)

This app aint it! Way too pricey for what you get. It's someone talking to you for a few mins. you can find meditation videos for that for free on youtube. When I didn't want the subscription anymore, they would not refund me the money. That's very bad business in my preference.
Can't beleive im paying so much for this only to have the sleepcasts crash after a few minutes about 99% of the time
keeps stopping

All the audio "experiences" are absolutely dominated by generic voiceover that constantly yaps at you. It's insanely loud compared to the backround and completely pulls me out of anything remotely resembling meditation or sleep. I paid money for this and can probably get a better product just asking ChatGPT for rain ambience. That is a genuinely special kind of terrible.
facing connectivity issues in the app.
it's not free at all, all the exercises require you to start a trail, so what's the point on downloading if you have to pay to use the app...

UPDATE: whatever new changes have been made to this app they are so frustrating. The app crashes constantly and I never had a problem before! on top of that the pages take forever to load. I'm reconsidering my purchase now. this used to be my favorite app and now it's completely unreliable. I didn't have this problem before - whatever updates they made have completely changed the app, And I'm frustrated that I'm paying for an app that doesn't work.
Keeps crashing since latest update December - issue is not fixed! It's worse! Please sort ASAP or I will not renew my subscription!
useful for people who can't work things out for themselves.
Just got an email thanking me for my payment. I cancelled the subscription midyear, but somehow I'm still being charged?? Not very relaxing losing money to app I don't use or want.
replyContent: Please reach out with your information to our support team at help@headspace.com. We look forward to assisting you!

content: Spent 10 minutes trying to find anything that was free, found a total of 3 things that were only 3-7 minutes long. Everything is behind a paywall. I remember downloading this app in 2019ish and it was much better when it came to free and pay ratio.

The app is broken now. The session stops and crashes multiple times within 15 minutes due to bogus network issues, even though I'm on Wi-Fi at home. It's definitely not a connection problem. 15 minutes must be cached on the device. Such instability is completely unacceptable for a meditation app. I've been using Headspace for close to 10 years now and have never had such problems before. I'm switching to Calm instead until this is resolved. This is frustrating.
impossible to cancel this ap

Update is horrendous. I've been using this for years (25,656 minutes used) and now it's unusable. Tracks stop after 30 seconds and it takes a day to load any pages. Devs really messed up a wonderful app. I'm really disappointed because I've used this for sleep, with my daughter and to teach mindfulness to students. And now it's just broken.
keeps telling me I have connection errors. unusable.
Needs a watch app, say play the sleep music and things like that.

I cancelled this before the end of the trial and was charged a full year anyway. I reached out to Headspace and they said it was a Google Play issue and Google Play said there is no proof the charge was "fraudulent", so apparently no one can help me get a refund for an app I couldn't afford

The Headspace content is great but the app has become increasingly frustrating. Initially it was just slow to react, if the kids wanted to change a sleep story for example. But more recently the app has just become unreliable, stopping playback after a few minutes. It's super annoying if you're trying to do a "Sleep SOS" but the app stops playing every 3 minutes and then instead of getting back to sleep I spend 15 minutes reinstalling the app and trying to get it working.
kept cutting out within 2 mins, even when downloaded.

Cuts off the meditation with seems you're offline and no one at Headspace cares. Also check the My Data section of the app because they default you to saying yes to selling your information. What a deplorable company.

ever since Ginger acquired Headspace, the direction the app has taken is less about meditation and more aboit mindfulness, therapy and workplace content. had a subscription since 2019 and this app was foundational to my practice but I didnt renew and have deleted the app on my phone.
doesn't sync to Google fit anymore since app was updated in September
useless app . not able to login and buy premium

I loved headspace for the longest time and it helped me a lot. However, if I want to be honest, I can no longer support the app. It had few issues in the past, but it still has major issues, like losing connection during long meditations, which is frustrating, such issues should not be my responsibility to solve. I think it is time for me to move on to other apps. The app no longer fulfills my needs.
ive been using this app for years at this point as of recently it keeps saying im offline even though I'm very much connected to the internet

I loved this app when I first used it 10 years ago - it was simple and felt authentic. I went to reinstall and was very disappointed that there is zero free content anymore and it looks as if the meditation has become gamified with 'streaks'. It's new duolingo but for meditation. How disappointing.

Been using this app for a few years now. The content is great but in recent weeks the app is constantly crashing, telling me I'm offline when I'm not. I contacted them to report it, but they've not been able to resolve the problem. From reading other reviews it seems to be a common issue with the latest version of the app. Very unsatisfactory
Good when it works ... BUT it Keeps Crashing 🫤 .. consistantly, over and over again
Is shutting down constantly the last month or so. Basically unusable now. Please fix.
My track plays four two minutes and then stops. Very annoying.
The app is good but the problem is that the care section of the app loads too slow or doesn't load. It needs a very strong wifi and doesn't load on mobile data. That needs to be improved.

I have had this app for literally years now. We used to love it. Now it won't load. Always says we are offline. If I can get it to load it works for 2 minutes then quite. My daughter uses it every night. Sounds like I need to move on and put my money into another app.

I have Samsung S25+ , and for more than a month the app stop again and again during the meditation and suggest to hear downloaded meditation. It doesn't happen with any other app only with headspace! No matter what I did, changed network, used only wifi, connection without wifi , cellular , nothing helps and Support telling me to upgrade to the latest version, which is exactly what I use. I really enjoyed this app until this issue began to happen. I am thinking of unsubscribe from headspace....

Sadly, the app currently doesn't work properly on Android, showing error messages of being allegedly offline (which isn't the case), hence stopping the audios. IT support acknowledged the problem but couldn't solve it.
don't even put the app free at this point everything, behind, paywall.

For an app that is quite expensive it is constantly glitching. I have used the app for quite some time. Recently every time I play a track it stops and says I have no internet connection which is incorrect. Can this issue please be sorted

The app could use A LOT of improvement. I sent the following suggestions through the only support form I could find, and got an utterly useless AI reply. Enough of this nonsense, DO BETTER. First, it would be very helpful to be able to do things with fewer taps: customize the homepage to quickly access certain libraries, eg. Sleepcasts; and more crucially have easier access the SOS resources. + bugs to fix: I constantly see a pop up saying I'm offline and the Explore button often doesn't work.
the app is crashing constantly today. not sure what the issue is, but it only lasts a minute or so each time.

usedto be a really good app, now buggy, slow, and crashes continously, use it for the sleep casts, takes forever to load and now fail within minutes telling me i am off line. considering cancelling subscription as the app has become useless
used to be great. no unusuable ... crashes 2 mins into every sleep cast. has been great but really regretting renewing in november. needs sorting or people will start asking for refunds

Changing my review from 5 stars in 2019 to 1. With every update, the app has gotten worse: harder to navigate, full of bugs, and now mostly unusable. It often won’t open, crashes constantly, Favourites and Recent are broken, excessively long loading screens after every click and recordings stop after a minute... Support gave a generic AI reply that didn’t help. Pushing of AI and therapy features is frustrating. I miss the simple app that actually worked. The price is not worth the struggle.
New bug crashes meditations when the screen goes to sleep
nice
Keeps crashing.

I have bought this app for years but recently I cant play any soundcast music without it giving me an error/ try again after about 1 min of playing.. what happened?? Hopefully they can fix because I really enjoy this app when it works... I will wait another month or two but if not updates, I will be canceling.

Uso la app para dormir, sin embargo, poco después de iniciar el sleepcast o cualquier otro material, se detiene de forma inesperada y solo aparece "oh dear, something is wrong", ocurre cada vez que inicio cualquier sleepcast, es muy molesto.

used for years but ever since the ai update the app takes ages to load to the point it's borderline unusable. not to mention that if i do accidentally click on the ai function it 1. doesnt load enough for me to use it anyway and 2. freezes the app to the point where i have to close and reboot it all over again in order to use it. the new ui hides my favorite courses from me in favor of pushing me towards the therapy/ai functions destroys the whole point of it being a mindful experience

Considering both that Andy would have learned mindfulness from actual, real life monks free of charge, and his claims that mindfulness helps the whole world, I consider the monthly fee to be rather steep. Aside from that, the content and app itself is useful and has helped me get started on a meditation practise.

your app make user difficult to remove payment method and subscription, your user experience is so bad, make user feel so worry and angry. I can't remove payment method, fortunely I don't have money on Visa account, if I have then I will lost money by Auto resubscription of your App
Another app that won't work if you don't create an account and provide personal details. Deleted.

Been a member for 3 years now. Was a great app in the beginning, but recent updates have almost rendered it useless. Super slow performance and sessions stop after playing for a few minutes. I keep thinking a new app update will come to resolve the issues, but its been months now with nothing. What does their IT team do??

They've locked most of all the once free meditations behind the premium, I no longer get premium anymore since it's too expensive and they've gotten rid of the lifetime membership too so they can keep sucking everyone's wallet through their aggressive subscription model. BUT it's alright cause I now use Meditopia which I've been able to purchase a lifetime subscription for! It's also better than headspace as their meditations have more depth to them imo, I'm a happy Meditopia customer now :)
I'm still on a trial using period and it's bugging a lot. I don't think I'll take subscription

Not worth it. The entire app is now a pay to play. You cannot listen along without paying for any videos. I used to use this app singularly for the Ebb reflection feature, but they have since gotten rid of it.
I love the content, but the app is glitchy and unstable. It's really disruptive to a sleep wind-down or meditation experience when the app quits in the middle of it!

usually amazing but In the last few weeks the bug when opening the app is soooo frustrating. back at it again with new bug. during a track it will randomly say 'your offline' and I'm definitely not. the track will stop completely and have to be backed out of reopened with hopes it won't happen again. it also says with this pop up, to listen to things I've downloaded. well when Ive tried to download things in the past and recently, the option to download isn't there. please help!
I just cancelled my subscription I had for 7-8 years. The app has been getting consistently worse over time. no more.

used to be a great app, used it for a few years . but recently its become almost impossible to use . unable to even open it most nights and when I can open it ,after about 2 minutes into a sleep story it stops and shows an error. I pay for this,it isn't free so should work everytime
app has been very slow and crashing a lot for me over the past few months. almost unusable.

This app has become absolute trash. Takes forever to load anything, white noise tracks abruptly end after a minute of play, some features don't even work. The developers have had multiple bad reviews, yet make NO improvements. Don't waste your money on a Headspace subscription, this thing is garbage. It produces more anxiety and frustration than it should, which is ironic for an appointment designed to increase relaxation.

Glitchy and unreliable. I love the app when it works, but there's always an issue. Current issue is the sleepcast stops running and says I'm offline when I have full wi-fi. Last months issue was buffering and taking ages to open. I have excellent superfast broadband so I don't understand.
this app has been incredibly glitchy for the past 6 months or so..! for an expensive paid for app, this really is unacceptable.!

Pretty wild that an app about meditation, connecting to yourself and reality, and improving mental health includes an AI chat bot at all, and there's no way to hide or disable it. Another example of hopping on a dangerous trend without considering the implications and negative impact it may have on users who rely on it. Bad form, shame on you.

Unfortunately, like most other folks on here I am disappointed with the 'upgrade' to the app. Used this app as a paid subscriber since 2014 and I will not renew. My meditation time across more than ten years is more than 75,000 minutes. I haven't used it in about a month. The support I have always received over the years has been excellent. The app is buggy, clunky, takes up huge space &c.. The app now embodies the Australian word of the year 2024. Did I say disappointed already?

Since the last UI update the app has been extremely slow to load. Keeps loading and telling me I have no Internet connection, which is definitely not true. meditations regularly stop while my phone screen is off. If this keeps up I'm cancelling my subscription.
app keeps stopping while doing sleepcasts. Useless
You Literally need to do a free trial which I don't wanna do cuz I'm gonna forget, But you literally need to just to view the basics.

Was great been using more frequently the past year, but now it says I'm offline, due to my Internet connection, only problem is that my Internet connection is fine with everything else on my other apps and using the web. This app is the only app that I'm having problems with and I paid for it.
Used to be a great app now it crashes all the time. Meditations turn off and it runs extremely slowly. Will probably cancel my subscription.

I love the content and it has completely changed how I sleep. My only gripe is that it is quite glitchy. I often have to shutdown and reopen the app to get it to function. I wish they would fix this as a crash in the middle of a meditation totally kills the vibe
Cute

horrible. I used to love this app, but I have not been able to use this app for a couple of weeks now because it keeps crashing. I have tried every troubleshoot option the AI chat gave me. support finally emailed me but no replies go through to them email, so I cant access something I paid for and also cant receive support. actively making my mental health worse at this stage.

seems to have stopped working for so many things now - meditations etc will just stop with an error message halfway. feels like there is a big issue with the last update which needs to be fixed? it is really disapointing when you've invested in an annual subscription.

the idea and available meditations and sleep casts are great. But the app is very slow and crashes regularly. It happened several times that the audio stopped a few seconds in and a restart didn't solve the issue. So I can't use the app reliably, even though I pay for the subscription

Great when it works. Every night I have to reboot my phone to open the app, otherwise it just hangs, then crashes a minute after opening. Update: sleepcasts are stopping early now, too. I'm about ready to cancel my subscription. The previous issue still isn't fixed.
I love Headspace!! There are so many ways to help me with being my best me and sleeping better along with so much more!!

I used to recommend this to everyone. Now, it seems so buggy that it is an actively bad experience. Meditations consistently fail to load. Some seem to, and then freeze at odd places, making it impossible to trust the built-in silences in those that do load - is this an expected pause or has something gone wrong? You'd think that the download option would help, but they disappear or claim to be "buffering". Really frustrating to take time out to be mindful only to end up fighting with an app.

App hasn't worked properly since the update. Displays the wrong pages until I click in and out of the reflection section and this week keeps stopping one minute into the sleep casts, not very relaxing at all!

retaliate? after writing the review below the app took 5 to 10 seconds to load any page? UNINSTALLED!!!!! _________David is awesome Aluna voice is one of the most agitating things I've ever heard when trying to be calm. I struggle with Focus issues and really wish David was available and canceled for this reason.

The volume of fluff in this app can make it difficult to navigate around sometimes - it's a bit chaotic. But more importantly (and irritatingly), the app stalls repeatedly, making it time consuming to get to what I want (often requires several retires). Decent content, but I'd look at other apps if I were you.

Good but annoying bugs. I have come back to Headspace as I find the app easier and less overwhelming to use that some others. It does seem to have developed some issues with loading time and also crashing halfway through meditations.

I've used headspace for 5 years. I listen to it at bedtime and so does my son. But it has been so glitchy for the past few months, I'm done. Taking forever to load or just not loading at all. Now it stops playing after 2 minutes unless I'm playing a downloaded sleepcast, but it won't play from the download and I can't find wherever they hide the downloads. Its becoming complete trash. I'm switching to Calm.
its been a bit unstable recently. if your internet disconnects during a meditation it just drops, not great if you're trying to breathe through some anxiety
just tried to meditate and the app keeps on stopping mid sentence. really disapointed.

Useless app. Used to be a great simple app with good meditations. But it's become a bloated and buggy mess that takes too long to load and is hard to find and meditations you want, if it even works. I now can't get through a meditation due to app errors.

No longer usable. I used to use the app several times a week, but recently there are so many bugs that it is impossible to use. App loads slowly, pages are not possible to navigate between (tap on another page and the same page just reloads), and when you finally get into a meditation it will stop after a couple of minutes with an error message.

New update is bad, it always worked until this last update, since then one cannot meditate peacefully because it stops working in the middle of the meditation, this now stresses the user which is quite the opposite of what meditation should do ...

the app seems to crash all the time, especially if I try to play something but minimize the app. I want to use the app for the bedtime stories but it will crash if I turn off my screen. I also wished that I could put a sleep timer on the stories because they're normally 45 minutes long, and I just don't need that much. it will actually wake me up at some point

Constant connection issues. It is slow to load and often says I'm offline even if I am connected to wifi or am in data range. Occurs mostly with the get care option which is very frustrating because then I miss my appointment time.

The app frequently hangs and freezes. It's almost I possible to finish an entire session (some are only 20 minutes) without it crashing more than 5 times. It's highly frustrating and impossible to use. I've tried various ways to solve this issue (reinstall, restart my phone, check internet, check stor) and none of them work. Have requested a refund and hope it goes through.
I have come back to this app after a while not using it and am disappointed. iIt crashed three times mid meditation which rather defeats the point.
lots of bugs lately

When it works it's great. Continually have to reinstall it because it just randomly crashes with an "oh dear, something went wrong" message. App had been screwing up for months yet Hs never updates it.

I have been using Headspace for years, however, recent updates have really degraded the experience. The app often freezes upon opening, and when it does actually open, it frequently takes over 10 seconds to load content. Sleepcasts and soundscapes error out and stop several minutes into listening. Customer service has been understanding and responsive, but unfortunately the app is not helpful in its current state.

Constantly crashes. I use the soundscapes every night for sleep, but now it crashes after a minute or less. It is also slow to load. It's a shame because I really enjoy using it but, currently, it is unusable.
needs update immediately, the app keeps crashing won't load and freezes, making it unusable and adding to the problem not fixing it
Persistent bugs that have not been fixed and causes your phone to crash. Disappointing for a paid app. Now, the app constantly says that you're offline and takes forever to load.
truly fabulous, when I experienced a loss I subscribed and did the Grief pack. It helped me monumentally. I still use it everyday to this day, worth every penny!

Love the sleep casts and the Ebb chat. However it repeatedly stops playing the sleepcasts saying "oh dear, something's wrong. Random nights. My wifi connection is fine. I close the app and reopen with the same issue a few times and give up. Then next night, no problem, then two nights later happens again. So insanely frustrating.

The latest update has caused the app to take minutes to launch/load. I'm tired of closing pop-ups for therapy; I didn't subscribe to HS for therapy and wish they could be opted out of. Since adding therapy services, the app performance has suffered. With the latest update, the soundscapes play for less than a minute before stopping now. Soundscapes have always been a bit buggy but the app is practically unusable for me now.

I only use Headspace for sleepcasts, as it's helped get me to sleep with having tinnitus for years. However, the app is so unreliable and I've not been able to use it for a week due to a bug that they are aware of. Sleepcasts aren't available on the website, which is really frustrating, because I'm paying for an app that I can't use.
The loading speed is slow and stressful. Super buggy. Cancelled the subscription because this app made me more stressful.
can't log in. keeps telling me I already have an account and to log in . which I proceed to do and it repeats itself. I'm locked out in a loop it feels like .
I loved the content but they charge you yearly without any notification. When you ask for a refund they dismiss you. Fake calmness and support, wrapped in consumerism.
I can't access any options without paying or doing a trail or something. I don't spend money on apps so this is not for me.

Used to be great but started to get very laggy which was mildly annoying but like others are now reporting it now disconnects and stops after a minute or so. For a relaxation app all of this is unacceptable so will not be renewing my subscription.
Great meditation app! The one thing I wish for is that you could start listening to a meditation/soundscape track before it has finished downloading.

loads extremely slowly now, and I don't want Ebb! sitting here waiting over a minute just to tap the next menu in the three I need to open a sleep cast. Meanwhile Ebb has a dedicated button and loads lightning fast, and I'll never use it!!!

Scam Alert. If you subscribe for a free trial through Google Play, Headspace will charge you for a full year, even if you unsubscribe before the free trial is complete. They will then say it's Google Plays problem and not help you. Be warned, their free trial will cost you $69.99 whether you like it or not. Review edited to 2 stars: as after 6 times telling me a refund was impossible, I canceled my bank card and put in a fraud claim. Finally Headspace relented and agreed to a refund.
lots of technical issues with video and the audio meditations cutting off so I had to unfortunately cancel it.
Too buggy now. I get "oops" pop ups from Headspace multiple times a day. Been a daily user since 2020 and this is a new issue.
App does not work well on android. Keeps giving error messages that it is offline. During a meditation, the app hangs and the meditation stops. I would expect more from an app I am paying for.

I've been a subscriber for 5+ years & for most of those years, the app was great. With the introduction of therapy & AI add-ons, the app gets incrementally worse. Now, the sessions just stop after a few mins with a connection error (which I know isn't on my end). I've been enduring the changes, hoping that each blip will be corrected for a better product in the long-term. It seems, however, it may be time to cancel my sub & seek a better service. It appears from other reviews, I'm not alone...

Dec 5th 2025 update has messed up the app even worse. If you're in a sleep cast, it will stop and tell you you're offline even if you're connected to wifi or good mobile connection. No way to download sleep casts either for when this happens 3 or 4 times per night.

App didn't recognize my google play subscription, even though I tried activating it several times. the app takes several minutes to load. I tried uninstalling and reinstalling twice. update: Headspace says Google play isn't activating the acct, gave "free" (I already paid) year. still having issues loading, so still 4 stars.

The app is unusable. Help line is chat AI that is even more frustrating. AI Keeps asking same questions. The content is good but using the app is terrible . Then you can't cancel the subscription. Terrible.

Poor technical performance. In the middle of streaming a meditation, it will cut out. But if it happens during a quiet part, you will never know, so you'll just sit there unaware that it froze up. Streaming audio is not that hard, come on, it's 2025.
replyContent: Thank you for reaching out. We are sorry for the trouble with the glitches you experienced. Please send us a note to help@headspace.com and we'd be happy to assist further

content: Was my go to app for sleep music and sleep casts. But not sure what has gone wrong the last 2 months. App is horrible now, slow and very buggy. Like other users, it cuts out now. It pisses me off and the opposite of relaxation. App makers, do not reply and tell me to email help@ like you have others. You know and knew you had major issues, and have not resolved it. Will not renew my subscription. Its a shame.

I used to love this app for meditation. it was my go to and I used it everyday. I even used it with my students at school who enjoyed and benefited from group meditation. But sadly in recent times the app has gone severely down hill. It is all but unusable now: glitchy ui, pages don't load, things are very slow when they do load. As well it is very difficult to find anything. It's the end of an era for me, and I will be unsubscribing.

While this app is offered free through my healthcare plan, it appears to be worth what I'm paying for it. I need background/white noise to sleep. There are a decent number of choices, but they all fail within 30-90 minutes with a notice that I'm "offline" & disrupting my sleep.

The app quality is going down. Long loading times, meditations being interrupted by "going offline " when connected, which means you must leave the app and reload really takes time out of mindfulness. Please re-evaluate the app entirely
I would have given it 5 stars before it was paywalled but unfortunately, nothing is free except the trial.
exceptional and worth every penny!
I usually love Headspace, but the latest update has absolutely broken the sleepcasts, which is infuriating for obvious reasons. Please fix!!
Thank you so much. I have been using this app for over 5 years now best in everything
replyContent: We deeply apologize for the inconvenience and want to help investigate the issue. Please reach out with your information to our support team at help@headspace.com. We look forward to hearing from you!

content: previously the interface was very easy to use..now after the latest update the app became clumsy and the interface is like some shopping app..it is not relaxing to use the app rather it is so distracting..so reducing the rating from 5 to 2.

This app used to really good but over the last year has gradually got worse. It's very slow to open, crashes frequently and at the end of a meditation session get black screen and run streak not updated. At the end of my subscription I will certainly consider moving to another app

Headspace starts well — beginner meditations are simple, clean, and actually teach you breathing and focus. But after that, it’s a paywall hell. Everything worthwhile is locked, making it a glorified wallet vacuum selling “peace of mind” like NFTs. The free part? A sad demo that wouldn’t calm a goldfish. If you don’t fix this, you’ll lose every beginner, and your app will be remembered as the joke that sold Zen like a scammy candy bar. 🔥😡💀, if you removed paywall, just reply to this.

This app has great content, I've used it for a long time but it seems to be operating slower than it used to and not loading various sleepcasts and meditations very well to point where I give up on using it. This is not a cheap app so I would expect better.
I used to use this daily but now the app crashes all the time. I can't load any meditations not very calming!
i love old daily list
Excellent. We'll worth having
Massive improvement to my well-being, I could not recommend it more. Great job Headspace team!

I've had only good things to say about this app until now... Every feature is now delayed to load. 5/10 sec might not seam like a lot, but when that happens for every program to load just to meditate really takes you out of it. please put it back the way it was. or I will not renew again. because now I'm paying for something I dont even want to use.
So good for your health and mind. I freaking love that this was invented. Beautiful!! Checkout DuckAndPheonix Podcast on Instagram. It doesn't pay so you know it's got to be good. ^_-.

so far the app seems really good, and I like that the meditations are so accessible (I mean short and on your own time, maybe not quite so easy to find in the app judging by other people's reviews) however I have only given it 3 stars because of the inclusion of AI which has no place in a mental health app, whatever safeguards have been put on place (having to put disclaimers on the Ebb front page should be a warning sign!)
Buggy. Crashes mid-meditation. No Google integration.

So disappointed you guys chose to take the AI route with Ebb... I'm leaving! Not only is AI a massive environmental issue, it has caused mental distress and deaths among children and fragile people. This is incredibly insensitive coming from an app like this.

Glitchy and the opposite of calm when faced with the wheel of doom trying to load a sleepcast in the middle of the night... When I open the app it takes ages to load and won't move into the "explore" tab. I've been forced to listen to the programmes I've heard before, as they're on the home screen. Please fix as I love the content, I just need to be able to get to it!

I've liked this app for a long time but over the years it has become impossible to find anything. Now it seems like you either have to use a search bar or interact with their AI companion which is miserable. Unsubscribing and bailing. there are a bunch of cheaper apps that do what I want better.
Horrible interface.. stood out immediately. Shockingly bad.

this is probably a great app, too bad the entire thing is locked behind a paywall I'm not paying for something I can find on YouTube for free. Fair enough if some or even most things come with a subscription but you need to pay just to use the app
"in app purchases" everything requires payment, you may as well pay up front instead of being misleading
App is good, but please implement adaptive icons!

Such a shame this app was so good in the past, now unusable since update. Customer service has become so poor have been waiting 4 days for a reply still no response. Have been left with no choice but to now cancel subscription.
bought linkedin premium and got 4 months of headspace subscription free. unable to use it on the app. after logging in, keeps asking me start free trial.
Great content, but sync to Google fit does not work. Also the older version of the app where it worked is not allowed to run
Latest update has left the app interface looking cluttered and not easy on the eye. Don't know how it passed user testing.

I love the app. It's helped me through difficult times and I use it to meditate or go to sleep almost every day. But for the past year or so it's become very slow to load and bugs have appeared. I'm having to load the app twice to get to the Explore page and with the slow loading screens that often takes over a minute. It's a shame that such a great service is tainted by such disappointing software issues. If this were a free app, I wouldn't mind so much but for a paid service, I expect better.

I love the headspace, but why did they get rid of like the morning, afternoon, then night page for meditations? That was my favorite part of head's pace because it gave me structure for the day. Please bring back a similar feature.

Very hard to find any genuine meditations. Poor layout and categorisations despite the good looking UI. Now vibrations have been added when pressing buttons in the app and no way to turn it off! This makes the app unusable for me.

Deeply Disappointing and Ethically Questionable Charged for a yearly subscription without ever getting the free trial. No one at Headspace is taking accountability for what seems like a payment glitch. Extremely stressful and ironic coming from a mental-health app. Highly unethical, zero transparency, and happening right before the holidays. Cannot recommend.
super buggy. implemented its own AI chat bot 🤢
I'm tired of AI features. it's not going to help me meditate better, it's just another distraction.

Edit: Despite having a paid plan to Headspace, I have uninstalled the app. In the past year, it has caused me more frustration than peace. It is slow to start up. Often the meditations don't load at all, and it's more difficult to find the meditations I've downloaded. Previously: 5 stars. Lovely meditation app. I have had a subscription to headspace the past few years, and the experience just keeps getting better. I love all the different courses, and it's a great reminder to pause and focus.

had to edit my review due to the latest updates making it frequently crash (mid meditation even) and become incredibly slow. Hope this is fixed ASAP simply the best part of my morning routine to set up for a great and mindful day.
I mean historically this app is incredible, but a recent update or something has rendered it unusable. it crashes after the first minute of a sleep cast every single night.
Worked great until most recent update. now it crashes 3 minutes into everything. not renewing my annual subscription if this isn't fixed soon
Prices are high.

Don't do it- they suck you in with a cheap offer, then get sneaky with billing and cancelations in addition to not having a transparent cancelation clause. Unless you plan to use it every day, it's not worth the hassle and headache. Not great overall, aside from the sleep stories there are much more affordable and comprehensive apps available.
Good content, but why change [crapify] the layout? It *was* linear and clear, progressing throughout the day in quick and easy view. Not anymore. Ugh, and why shove AI to the front?? DO NOT WANT.

Headspace has been a game changer for my mindfulness and meditation. I never really took it seriously before but after actually trying, I can see the benefits it has. A bonus is that the subscription is covered by my insurance (and from what I've heard a lot of other insurance plans).

The product itself has been fine, but I'm really disappointed that there was no heads-up before the annual renewal. A quick reminder so customers can review their usage and decide whether they want to continue would make sense. an email would have made all the difference. Hoping the company reconsiders this process going forward.

Ditto all of the recent negative reviews. The app is extremely buggy and slow. Infuriating to use. I have the service as part of my employer benefits, but it's not a useful benefit if the app is unresponsive.
Very chaotic design. Very difficult to navigate what the app offers, very difficult to find and continue the programs you started. That's everything a meditation app should not be.
I think Headspace came into my life at the right time.
The content is great, but the app is horrible: very slow, I need to restart it many times during the use to make it work, very annoying! It worked well a year ago, but not anymore

the UI changes that keep being implemented are horrible, have no sense, and change what was an intuitive and well running interface into something clunky and not user-friendly. I'm not sure whether they did any user testing before coming up with these changes, but they really don't seem to be based on anything. bring back the old, tried, and true UI. just read the number of complaints about the latest update, note to you product owner just revert the PR. no one likes these new updates.
Have paid for a year's subscription, and yet all the content is locked. Customer Service is nonexistent, they have taken my money though that bit was very efficient
Compared to waking up! 3.5 stars is fair also app lags alot
Start your free trial. You're no eligible for the trial.
useless customer service
I've used it for years but it has been giving bad login errors for the pass 3 weeks. Reset password doesn't work. I don't know what i am paying for the frustration just increases my stress
Latest version is difficult to navigate for courses without getting duplicate content or seeing the same content again and again. would be much better if recommendations had clear pathways
paid full yearly price, 12 hours later received a discount code from them. emailed a request to apply the discount code, they refused. really poor customer experience.

Sad it's changed. I've paid for a subscription to Headspace for years, but unfortunately won't be renewing due to the app now becoming slow, unresponsive and not worth the hassle. I gave ample time to see it it was going to get any better before reviewing and cancelling and it has not. When you pay for a service you expect it to work properly and unfortunately this one just doesn't work smoothly anymore

I haven't got the app for long now and I really like to use it. The thing that annoys me is the "Explore tab". Most of the times I open the app and want to go into the library aka the "Explore tab" and the app sabotages itself and nothing happens. I have to close and restart the app MULTIPLE TIMES before it works.

Unfortunately, this app just gets worse. Besides the unnecessary amount of features and videos that are hyper stimulating and distracting from the meditation, it's now full of bugs. The audios from some sessions suddenly stop working or don't even start at all. I wish there was an option to hide anything but the meditation assets, I used to love this app when this was its main focus.

Recently renewed my sub and regret it immensely. I dislike being hounded into signing up with their therapists. I can't even get to my settings without being forced to go to the "sign up with a therapist page" the fact that an icon for that also takes up valuable task bar space is annoying. You are taking my money in order to push your therapist service. Really truly bad taste, Headspace. you aren't what you used to be. I want my money back.
endless buffering. its irking when you're trying to relax for a minute and spend 20 minutes trying to get the app to work. i press play on the cbt course, i just get buffering and nothing loads.
All the videos and expert guidance can't be opened - getting the message that something is wrong and need to try again later. So can't access the majority of content - waste of time and money.

I like headspace but i hate the app. So much stuf, i have no idea how to find anything i need and see no structure in hundreds of courses and singles. Really frustrates me every time i am trying to find something beside basics.

This app is not what it once was - so painfully slow to load and awful navigation

Enshittification at its best. I have been a long time headspace user and hate to see how this app is devolving. Why at any point would you say "Hey I know, let's make everything more difficult for our customers to navigate?" "How about we remove all descriptions and narrator names?" "Favorites?? No, our customers don't deserve to have favorites." WHYYY???
used daily for years, helped me transform

app is extremely buggy, scheduling sessions never receive confirmation or meeting info. never able to get help from their support, all they do is to forward your issue to the tech support team offline. and nothing comes off it. Feels like they're taking easy employer money, but never provide the proper service
cancelled my subscription 4 months ago, charged me regardless for another year. they wouldn't issue a refund even though I've notified them of the issue within 24h a shame for an app about wellbeing
Helps me to focus 😌
app is really poor. takes ages to load and sleepcasts are buggy. gone downhill

LinkedIn Premium is promoting 4 months of free Headspace, but the reality is completely different. After logging in, there is no option to claim the free subscription. Instead, the app asks you to pay for the remaining 8 months upfront before you can access anything. This is misleading and feels like a trap, not a genuine free offer. Customers expect transparency, not hidden conditions. I’m sharing this so others don’t get fooled by this “4-month free” claim.

Update 25/11/25: Investigated and found I was meant to have access for as long as my employment! Verifying teaching status is failing now 🙄😔. I felt disappointed by this as I used it one night to go to sleep and the next night everything was locked.
The latest update ruined the app and google fit sync is also broken. Thanks I guess....

Since the update the app feels very cluttered and it's harder to find everything. sometimes it feels quite overwhelming when I just want to find a sleepscape or mediation. Kept getting log out. Even though it's linked to Google account, doesn't let me log in (kept popping that there is an issue but no other solutions). Went in thinking it'd be useful but EVERYTHING costs money. Funny that its an app to help reduce stress when spending money is a HUGE stress factor. Wish this company had better morals than profiting from mental ill people looking for a place to meditate.

good

Very slow recently

I am missing half of the meditations in my activity I've done over the past month. Significant downgrade in quality overall.
not free
Unable to log in. I have tried all ways and it constantly says I have an account already and can't log in. I've never used the app before

latest update has made the app really laggy. 1st October edit and it's still awful, none of the updates speed up the awful lagginess since you added the AI thing 😭 November edit - fed up of the app performance so I've cancelled, can highly recommend Plum Village instead!

not what it used to be. the user interface is the opposite of relaxing. it seems like such a messy app, different things everywhere. difficult to find and explore despite there being an explore tab. how about a simple search bar? and it seems all of Andy's stuff is just cut up and recycled old stuff... you can tell because the sound of his voice literally changes between the intros and the guidance. after years and years I've decided to go with a different app.
This app is painfully slow to load, difficult to navigate and was a nightnare to sign up to. I get it free with my insurance. I can't believe people actually pay for it
it's not a free app it's just a free trial very misleading

I previously gave this app a 5 star review, as I have been using it for years.
